reviews.review_text: Great price. No extra charge for pets .very pet friendly large areas to run around and large off leash park also. Cabins are clean and comfortable and on other side of town away from the hustle and bustle. Nice place to stay.

Nice gardens, clean park and facilities.  Dog friendly.  Out of town (about 1/2 hr) out of central. ,bus stop opposite and bus is 50c each runs every half hour roughly.  Airport is located right behind park, so can get noisy during the day, (this is where the tourist flights, helicopters and skydive leaves from).  Reception friendly.  Great cafe at the small airport - 3min walk
Shops short drive
Great park quite. friendly staff

Great campsite - very clean, nice infrastructure, lovely landscaping, perfect location.

Loved the proximity to the airfield!!
Had a great stay here. Clean, tidy, well organised and the staff were extrememly friendly and accommodating. Would stay here again

Would definitely come back!
Neat, clean accomodations with all you you need.
I’ve read some previous reviews about the check in staff not being friendly and can’t say the same.
We checked in on March 15th around 1pm and the reception lady (she was on her 50s-60s) was EXCELLENT! Very friendly, attentative, positive and with great disposition big shot out to her. There is nothing better than start your holiday than being host by someone with her beautiful energy

Also amenities were impeccable, keeping a pool that it’s constantly being use clean and debre free is not as easy as one would imagine!!!!

So thank you to all the staff for making our experience memorable

Location and the grounds are stunning! Beautiful place.
Check in staff are not exactly friendly. For a place that advertises itself as an 'eco' place, it has no recycling facilities? If they do, they're well hidden. Our room had no curtains on the windows, just the bars where they used to be. The cooking utensils are so cheap they bend when you try to use them. Probably wouldn't go back.

Heerlijk 2 nachten geslapen. Groot ruim bed, goede douche, alles voldeed aan verwachtingen.

Ik heb veel locaties gehad in Australie om te overnachten en dit was een van mijn favoriet.

Vliegtuigjes en helicopters hoor je met regelmaat voorbij razen, maar ik vind dat wel leuk. Als je je daar aan gaat irriteren, niet hier boeken. Maar dat is denk ik wel logisch

Het cafe van The Hangar naast het park is een aanrader. Prima eten, lekker dichtbij en leuk vliegtuigen kijken.

Dichtbij Airlie, maar ook dichtbij verschillende uitkijkpunten en wandelroutes. Als je een auto hebt en niet perse in het centrum hoeft te zijn, is dit een hele fijne locatie

Tours voor snorkelen hebben dit park als ophaal punt

Tours voor vliegen, skydiven etc… is op loop afstand!

Nice caravan park , really well looked after .
Friendly staff
BUT it's next to an airport ( small planes ) really noisy - if I had known that we wouldn't have stayed there
All day planes leaving and landing.

Location of this site in terms of the town is great, right on the bus route, 10 mins into the centre.
The site it’s self is very dated, it needs a tidy up, gardens are unkept, kitchen area is not great - there was a sign saying closed for deep cleaning in Tuesday - the area hasn’t seen a proper clean for a number of months. Showers and toilets were clean. Quiet site.
The site is right next to the runway for Whitsundays airport, there is only a fence line separating the two, plans start at 6:30. It wasn’t an issue for us as we were awake anyway and if you like planes, it’s great as you can get all through to the airfield. Check out the cafe there, absolutely lovely for breakfast, real gem.
Overall ok, but please have a tidy up around site and this could be a lovely place in the amongst the trees.

Lovely area
Well looked after by staff⁰

Had an overnight stay in our caravan at the park. It is a beautiful dog friendly park with clean amenities. The park has a small off leash dog park which was a nice added touch for our pooch. A bit of noise from airstrip next door but it really wasn't too much of a bother. Was able to walk through the park to the cafe at the airstrip for coffee and breakfast which great! Staff were very friendly and the park is well maintained. They have dog friendly cabins also :)
Reasonable nightly rates! Would highly recommend!
Perfect but you need a car, your very far from everything.
Stayed in the pet friendly cabin and we had everything we needed. Thamk you for having us

The toilet room wall was dirty . The pot and pan are all with scratches and worn off .||The laundry service requires a local mobile phone number to make payment which was very inconvenie||The park was well maintained and the facility was good .||The surrounding environment was quiet and cosy though .||Could have been better.

We wanted to book a site for a campervan but i could not manage to do it on my phone. We decided to drive directly to the camp park, and arrived à 4:46pm. The reception was already closed, although it was not supposed to be closed before 5pm. The receptionnist inside told us it was closed, although it was not even 5 and that her computer was shut down. When we tried to explain the situation to her she yelled at us. Before this, I tried to call the camp, at 4:30 twice and nobody answered as if nobody was there. But the lady at the reception just did not want to listen to us and refused that we make a booking. Not friendly at all

Booket dobbelt da vi var flere i reisefølget som så på plasser, de nekter å refundere for dette selv om bookingen var gjort bare 12 timer før og gjaldt for 3 netter. De får fort leid ut dette igjen. Skjønner det er policy men det er lov å være fleksibel Veldig dårlig kundeservice!!

A great stay in the Superior 2 Bedroom Cabins, clean and modern look. The Cafe had great coffee and delicious brekky. This Big 4 is perfect if you’re not interested in the water parks and they still have a nice pool! It’s a much more affordable option.

we were to stay there in early November but we received a phone call advising us that the air conditioner was not working 24 hrs prior to our arrival so we opted to find seek another accom we received a full refund just wanted to thank the staff of the park for their honesty they were very apologetic and sincere so a big thank you to the staff although we never stayed there we would definitely recommend them just on that thank you again much  appreciated
Best camping! Great staff, lovely sites. Everything is perfect and clean. You will feel like in a paradise.

Excellent place to stay. Very well maintained with a nice pool. Just outside of the main town of Airlie Beach so it is nice and quiet. Very friendly staff. This park is a credit to them. Right next to the airstrip that takes people out for sightseeing and sky diving. The Hanger Cafe has great coffee. Definitely worth the drive and I will definitely be back to stay again. Safe and friendly.

We had a lovely stay at big 4 Whitsundays . The leafy gardens are beautiful and well cared for, and the hosts were warm and welcoming. Our standard cabin was comfortable but showing its age—it could use a little refresh, which I understand is already in the works. The Hanger Café next door is a great spot for a meal or coffee. You do hear planes from the nearby airport occasionally, but it’s only for a moment and doesn’t take away from the relaxing atmosphere. Overall, a great place to stay!
What a magnificent caravan park. Absolutely stunning. The grounds are perfectly maintained and the amenities, spotless. I'll be back and will be staying longer. Did not want to leave at all!!

We really enjoyed this caravan park. The gardens were beautiful, facilities clean and staff very friendly. The airport next door was a highlight for us as our 7 year old was thrilled to watch the tourist planes take off and land, as well as watch the sky divers float down to the tarmac. The planes started around 7am and finish by sundown so it didn't affect our sleep. Would definitely recommend.

We have had the unfortunate experience staying at big 4 eco.

The aircon seemingly stuck on a very low temp making it absolutely freezing 24/7. Whilst suffering from bronchitis this has been really awful to our coughs.
No updates or sympathy from the staff handling it.
There is no weatherstrip on the bathroom door, it was disgusting watching the cockroaches coming from under the door.
The exhaust fan is broken and dirty in the bathroom
There are no blinds to the kitchen, it is extremely distressing chasing after a toddler with all the passers by staring in. When I raised this the management team had zero care and simply advised it never had curtains. Which clearly isn't true because there are tracks!!!

The kitchen lacks utensils.. tongs and the correct pans to even use the induction stove top.

What an awful stay and we cannot wait to check out tomorrow.
Great place just beware your right beside the runway

It was a really pleasant stay! Resort was clean, well maintained, simply beautiful and surprisingly cheap (powered site in my case). Of course there is an airport and a little noise from that - but honestly, you stop thinking about it after one hour.
Great spot for a stay great Cafe next door where you can watch the tourist planes take off and land
Hidden Gem

A nice basic caravan park. Clean amenities. Next to the airstrip so fairly constant plane and helicopter noise all day. They charged $7 for a 5kg load of washing with a 30 minute cycle. It's a fair way out of Airlie Beach. We had a nice flat camp site, but not shady or private. A great spot for couples not wanting the hustle and bustle of families as there are no kid-friendly activitieed asides from the pool.
Amazing stay at BIG4, beautiful place very near to Airlie Beach with direct access to the whitsundays with boat or plane

We stayed in our caravan and had no problems getting in and out of the park. All amenities were clean and well kept by happy and helpful staff.|We were joined by friends who flew to Procipinr and joined us  in one of the Cabins for part of our stay|I feel that the park location was a major advantage, being close to all our planned activites and away from the noise and bussel of the town. Overall a very pleasant experience for our stay.

Whilst the site spacing is a little tight, this could be overlooked, as the amenities are clean.

However, the distance from town and the fact that the park is virtually ON the airport runway, overshadows any positives.  The flights start around 6:30am, and are constant.  CONSTANT.

It's hard to call it an Eco-Resort when you are breathing in av-gas for 12 hours each day.

Washing machines are exxy at $7.43 a load!

Der Campingplatz ist gut ausgestattet. Der Pool hat uns sehr gefallen.
Die Lage ist nicht so ideal. Es ist direkt am Flughafen und deshalb sehr laut. Man muss das Auto oder den Bus in die Stadt nehmen. Und in der Nähe des Campingplatzes gibt’s nur ein Cafe (war geschlossen) und sonst nichts.Wir sind eine Nacht früher als geplant abgereist, da alle Touren zu den Whitsunday ausgebucht waren. Leider mussten wir trotzdem voll zahlen. Kulanz wäre schön gewesen.
Beautiful location just outside Airlie Beach. Good for families and anyone that likes to relax. We stayed in very comfortable modern cabins.  Would happily return.
Beautiful place out of the hustle and bustle of airlie city its quiet and calming. Staff a super helpful.
Schöner Platz neben dem Flugplatz.

A nice place to stay if you don’t mind the planes next door. Good facilities and staff were lovely. Unfortunately both nights we were there we had some loud international traveler's (different ones each night) wake us up throughout the night despite us repeatedly reminding them to be quiet (well after 10pm).

Stayed in 2 bedroom cabin. Fully self-contained. Cabin was functional, well appointed, clean (and air-conditioned!)  The reception staff were friendly and helpful. We did not use the resort facilities however travellers and families were catered for.|The resort was located away from Airlie Beach (approx. 10 mins) away on road to Shute Harbour.
Well managed friendly and helpful.

We had such a great experience at BIG4 Eco Lodge in Airlie Beach! I accidentally booked the wrong dates and our site was already reserved, but the staff went above and beyond to shuffle things around so we could stay an extra night. They made what could have been a stressful situation really easy and hassle-free.||The park itself is clean,well located for exploring Airlie Beach. Facilities are well maintained, and the whole place has a really relaxed vibe. It’s clear the staff genuinely care about their guests.
Very lovely but extremely  busy even though it is not school holidays, I would definitely recommend though 👌

Lovely campsite with great prices. Thought the camp kitchen would have been bigger for such a big campsite - only two hobs. Toilets and showers were always clean. Laundry facilities were great. Very friendly and helpful reception staff. Right by the airport for the reef flights I was getting such FOMO because we hadn’t booked a scenic flight. The noise wasn’t a problem for us. Live music on Wednesday night was lovely! Great vibes and really enjoyed it. Would definitely stay again!
Nothing more to say other than I wish I had more time to stay.
Cheap place to stay, close to airport in Whitsundays, but nice surroundings
Very friendly and helpful front office. Arrived a day early by mistake. Park was fully booked out. The staff went out of their way to find a place for us. Not easy with a 22ft van.

Airlie Beach is busy. Flat out busy and very much a tourist town with restaurants and bars and lots of hype. |Staying here was a nice break from the chaos and intensity of the township. |But . . . The airport is literally over the fence and is not only busy during the day it is also pretty smelly. |Also the sites are small and access is tight with a caravan. |The amenities were clean enough but were quite a walk from our site. |Additionally there is no beach access from the caravan park and you will need to travel the 5k back into town and pay for parking to access the beach.
Competitively priced because it is a little further from town & the airport next door is very noisy during the day. Sites are nicely shaded, good pool, amenities are ok.
Super camping, les douches et toilettes sont propres, la camp kitchen est bien. Le personnel est super sympa. On est très bien situé et le camping est jolie.

Great price for a big4 especially in the Whitsundays. I guess the location puts its down because it’s quite far out from airlie beach but the facilities were clean and the showers were hot!! $35 per night 2 people powered site. Nice little cafe next door on the airport runway🥰

Stayed here for 8 nights. The location its self is really beautiful, with lots of shade. Our experience was, im sad to say not good. Our site was very small and we weren't able to put our privacy screen out due to all the trees. Next to an airport and the planes start about 7.30am. The fumes are yuk and the noise is loud. Planes are leaving regularly. If you love planes then this is for you, a very short walk and you can sit in the Cafe and watch. We are very disappointed and won't be back.

We had a great stay in this pet friendly caravan park. The cabin was awesome and well equipped. They even had a dog park in the resort which was a big plus.

The only down sides i see are:
- the wifi was very weak
- barely any mobile phone signal on either vodafone & optus, i suspect this is due to the airport next door

Great campground!
Fantastic place for kids, so much to do!
Clean bathrooms, love how there is no code on doors and grounds were immaculate!!
All the staff at reception were great, but Beth was brilliant, thank you!
Would highly recommend!! A+++

This is definitely a 10/10 resort park.
The facilities are outstanding and the park is in a fantastic location with lots of things and lots of nothing when you just want to relax.
The staff are so friendly, especially Ash, who helped us with tour options and places to visit including places to eat.
Cannot speak highly enough of the lovely location and staff.
Definitely recommend BIG4 Whitsunday.
This is our 3rd visit and will be back again.
amazing accommodation!! It has everything you need!!

Wow, just wow!
Just msg'd a friend and said this place is paradise, and we travel a lot!
The staff make it, no doubt of that, but the entire place is immaculate and thoughtfully set out.
We are in a cabin but the caravan bays... omg, divided from your neighbor by a beautiful planter, looks totally private and drive through too.
So much going on  We're always receiving texts advising and inviting us to the various activities.
Only been here 2 nights so will update when we've been here a bit longer.
Well done team!
Very clean and well maintained area, our kids loved the water park

We had 8 days there with family. Grown adults and grandchildren. 6 year old and 20 month old. The park was wonderful, so much for the kids to do. We had 2, 2 bedroom cabins. Plenty of room and with a lot of essential items including a dishwasher. Was very quiet and the grounds are well looked after and maintained. The kids had a great time at the pool, animal park ( on site) the Froggy express train, craft making and swimming with the mermaid. Close by was shopping mall with Woollies, big w, butcher, newsagent and more. Also takeaway food close by. |The only negative was there was no gate on the verandah, and as we had a 20 month old we couldn’t really sit there and relax. Otherwise would highly recommend staying here.
Great weekend away for the family , very friendly staff and great facilities.
The whole place is well maintained and presented staff were fantastic would recommend this place for your next getaway. So much for the kids to do

Found this park to be very clean and enjoyable
Staff are all friendly and helpful
Facilities are plentiful
Lots for the kids to do.
Fans are very noisy at night.

From the moment I walked into the reception area, I knew I would love this place. It was fully decorated to embrace the Anzac Day spirit. It was absolutely brilliant!  It was the only place I’d seen to remind me that it was actually Anzac Day in 2 days. Well done for doing that!  The girls at reception were so helpful & nice, it was like talking to a long lost friend. The park & rooms are so clean & tidy. So many people having a good time & kids laughing. We are an older couple, our family have moved to America, but we felt like we have made more friends & family in the few hours we’ve been here. We will be back for sure & I hope we see you there too.

I stayed at this Big 4 property for 7 nights overall and had a mostly positive experience.

The facilities and general atmosphere were great, and the staff were friendly and helpful throughout my stay. The park itself was clean, well-maintained, and in a good location, which made it easy to relax and enjoy the surroundings.

However, there were a couple of issues with the kitchen facilities that were disappointing. One of the BBQs was out of service for the entire duration of my stay, and 2 out of the 4 gas burners were also not working the whole time. This made cooking a bit inconvenient, especially during busier periods when other guests were also trying to use the remaining facilities.

Aside from that, everything else was enjoyable, and I still had a good stay. With better maintenance of the shared kitchen equipment, this would have easily been an excellent experience.

We love staying at the Big 4 Whitsundays. The caravan sites are ample, grounds are well kept and activities are a plenty for kids. 5 stars to the staff who work tirelessly to keep grounds presentable and the kids happy.
Our experience was top job and there is absolutely no fault here. I especially loved that they unpacked the stuff that needed to be in the fridge and freezer
So much fun to visit with kids.  Staff were friendly and helpful. Facilities were well maintained and clean. Couldn't be happier

We had an amazing holiday! My daughter loved the water park, and there were plenty of activities to enjoy each day. It’s conveniently located near a supermarket, and it’s easy to catch the bus to Airlie Beach.
We really like resort my kids really loved it. Good facilities
Nice big sites, lots of activities for kids, amenities spotless highly recommend staying there
The kids had a blast! Heaps of activities and lots to do. The place feels a little tired and needs a freshen up. The cafe also needs an overhaul. To be fair, the kids really loved it.

Stayed at a powered caravan site and it was centrally located within the park, close to amenities and camp kitchen/bbq area.
The park has lots of various activities for kids like the pool, waterslides, tipping bucket, mini golf, tennis, soccer/football fields, petting zoo, jumping pillows and more.
Highly recommend this caravan park for anyone travelling through, it is also in close proximity to the major shopping centre in the region for all those extra needs.

We stayed in the 3 bedroom cabin for a week. The staff were super helpful before we even arrived. Our flight was delayed by a night. The staff helped us, by putting the first night on credit that we used during our stay for some of the activities.

The waterpark and pool are really fun, the kids loved it! We went everyday. The rooms were close and clean. TV and internet included. We didn’t even want to leave. Will be back 💕
Great place! Exceptionally kid friendly (except for the massive water bucket, be careful). Just some minor things that don't make it 5 stars like a shower, stove and barbecue not working.

It's was ok but expensive. It does off nice things but there best done with friends (if you have any witch I dont) and after a few days they do get a bit stale, the food at the cafe is not great too. No classic eggs and bacon and the milk shake is ice in milk (how does watered down milk sound?) On the last night we where staying the cafe stayed open for dinner and did burgers, I got the tropical burger. The menu listed the ingredients and it didn't say it had mayo, when it got it and opened it I saw it had mayo. Witch I can't eat.
Great fun, the kids had a ball. Didn't take many pictures as we were to busy having fun 😀

This resort is fab. Easily one of the best caravan parks we have ever been to. We got an ensuite site and found it super easy to find everything. The water park was great and the Easter decor in the main reception was absolutely insane - they really outdid themselves! They also had slushies which was fantastic on a hot day.

The mini golf was fun, but needed a little work in terms of landscaping and some signage to show where the entry was would be ideal. I had no idea you could enter from through the pool.

The only thing that was a bother, was the insane amount of text messages we received. 8 messages in two days... a tad excessive.

But, we will definitely be staying again! Highly recommend.

Have just finished our stay & we were blown away! The park is incredible, staff were super friendly & the rooms were great! Our children got to engage in Easter activities, kids club, feed the parks animals, play mini golf & swim in the incredible water park/pool! We LOVED our stay and are sad to be leaving! Can’t wait to be back again one day! Definitely recommend 🌟

My honest review after staying at almost every big 4 from NSW -QLD is this park is very overrated and not worth the money.

Sites are shit
Showers were cold no hot water
Animal park always booked out
Hardly any free activities for the kids

Very disappointed for a park that spends so much $$ advertising being number 1

We paid for a day access. Reasonably priced for daily access.
Access to all facilities provided. Tennis, water park, all amenities. Food & drinks provided by a caravan on site but not a lot of choices. Overall a good day with the kids.

We live within an hour of the park so we are frequent users throughout the year. I also bring school groups here on camp and use the bunk house facilities. Our family can't recommend this park enough. It is award winning and you can see why. What I love right now is seeing that they are continuing to make changes and improvements to the park. Animal park upgrades are fantastic. Love the pickleball court and jumping pillows and we are busting to see what comes out of that fancy new train shed!
The best part however is the service. Staff who genuinely care for their park and the experiences of the users.
Thanks again to the entire team x 🙌
We visited here for the day. The water park is great and well maintained. Lots of friendly staff around to assist you with anything. Toilets and showers are clean.
Large sites in a tropical rainforest setting at a great value for money price
Great park, reception very accomodating to change our site from amongst trees to a slab site nearer amenities which was great. Amenities a bit old in need of a bit of an update.

My wife and I had a fabulous stay along with our 2 dogs. The location of the the resort is great and the park facilities are excellent. A bonus is a quick walk to an excellent cafe at the neighbouring airport. We enjoyed our stay so much that we added an extra night. The pet studio cabin was adequate but is needing a bit of a refurbish. We look forwatd to returning in the future.
This would have to be the prettiest camping ground I have ever stayed in....everything is just perfect....I wouldn't change a thing.

Best accom so far on our trip to nth qld. Cabins very generous, clean, large shower cubicle, hot showers. Not in walking distance to main strip, def value for money.   Big tv, comfy lounge. Quiet park, but air strip next door, so chopper tours going frequent.

We booked one night here in advance. However, as is often the case with long-term travel, unexpected delays can happen. On the day we were meant to arrive, we called to request a postponement of our booking by two days. Rebecca, the receptionist, informed us that this was not possible and that cancellations must be made at least six days in advance. Unfortunately, we had no way of knowing about the delay that far ahead.

Upon reviewing their cancellation policy, we saw that exceptions can be considered in special circumstances — yet this was never mentioned during our call. As a result, we lost the full amount we had paid, which was extremely disappointing.

What makes the situation even more frustrating is that the same night was still available for booking, indicating that the campground was not at full capacity. This suggests that a postponement could have been accommodated.

We will definitely not be booking here again. Throughout our Big Lap around Australia, we’ve had to reschedule bookings with other providers, and it has never been an issue. For such a large company, BIG4 should take customer service and flexibility more seriously. This was a very disappointing experience.

Fantastic!! Pet friendly room is sensational. Clean, well equipped and large. Absolutely wouldn't want to stay anywhere else. Lawns and place is immaculate. I cannot praise the team who look after this place enough, you can see all the hard work. Great team obviously which shows in the grounds, reception and rooms.
Thank you for making our last night in Airlie Beach finally a positive one 😊
This is a great spot. We were in the eco cabins up the back. Everything was great & easy walk through to the Hangar cafe & great coffee.

After a month of camping we stayed in a Studio at the Caravan Park in Airlie Beach. The bed was comfortable. The room was spotless. The kitchen had everything we needed. The shower worked perfectly. Parking right outside made everything easy. A 10/10 experience.

Wir waren innerhalb einer Woche zum zweiten Mal auf diesem Campingplatz. Das erste Mal hatten wir uns eine cabin gemietet, das zweite Mal einen Ensuite Platz. Wir sind seit 6 Monaten unterwegs, und das war bisher der beste Campingplatz. Tolle, eingewachsene Stellplätze, super Pool, sehr gepflegte Anlage, freundliche Mitarbeiter. Auch die Ensuite war sehr gepflegt und geräumig. In dieser Größe hatten wir noch keine. Wir können den Platz nur weiterempfehlen.

Absolutely loved our stay at the big 4 in Cannonvale. The location is amazing and the staff were absolutely fantastic especially Ash who went above and beyond in her service, she was so kind and sweet to us. Would definitely stay here again.

Honestly we had the best time having this place as our home base while in the Whitsundays. The staff are all incredible: so very friendly and helpful, but I have to give special shout out to Issy who was also fabulously bubbly and outgoing. I think it takes a special kind of person to stand out in an environment that already delivers 10/10 customer service but Issy does it!

The grounds and cabins are immaculately clean. It’s clearly a full time job managing the grounds and they have it down to an art form.

My kids & I loved the pedal karts, the waterslides, tennis on the court, and playing handball. They have a range of balls & equipment you can hire for a heap of different games, so you don’t need to have brought any of these things with you to enjoy the fun which is great.

Lots to do for the kids and handy to have Woolworths and a few shops near by, and the bus stop. But be aware you are a 10m drive from Airlie and not much around. The staff are mostly really friendly and helpful. My only real issue is the cabins and pool area - both quite dated and in need of some TLC. Definitely doesn’t look as bright and colourful as the website pictures. Our air con smelt of damp / mould, the shower nearly peeled my skin off and it just all felt a little old. We’ve stayed at a few big 4a before and just feel a little disappointed in this one.

We had such an amazing time at the park! Our accommodation was lovely, so clean, modern and the beds were very comfortable. There was so many awesome activities for the kids we actually extended our stay to jam it all in. Having a different cuisine food van visit every night was awesome. We can’t wait to be able to come back.
I had a wonderful time with my friends at Big4. Special thanks to Nacho from the grounds team, who gave me great advice on places to visit. He was very friendly!

My first Big 4 experience and let me tell you, I now understand what the hype is all about. They’ve thought of everything!! Such an amazing stay with our friends and family. You’ve converted me to holiday park camping. Thanks a bunch!
Great few days away with the family

We had a great stay at BIG4 Adventure Whitsunday Resort. Fantastic place for families with kids. The rooms were very good and had a welcoming, home-like feel, and the staff were friendly and helpful.
One small suggestion: our room was quite far from the shared BBQ area, so it could be great if guests had the option to hire a small BBQ to use on their deck. Another idea could be having small trolleys available to borrow for shopping trips, especially for families without a car.
Overall a really enjoyable stay and a great place for families visiting the Whitsundays.

If you’re looking for a fun filled family holiday with it all then look no further than the big 4 Whitsundays. The pool and waterslide a highlight and we used most of the facilities including animal park, kids club, outdoor cinema, coffee cart and lovely evening meals from food trucks. Just a fun filled family vacation. Thank you so so much. We will be back.
Had amazing stay everything here for the kids .A big thankyou to Demi for everything she did for our family
The service is top notch!Our cabin was very spacious and clean.The shower pressure is insane lol.Would highly recommended anyone looking to stay in the area this is a top spot :)Will return 100%

We had a very uncomfortable checking in experience. For some reason the receptionist thought an 03 phone code was international so refused to call the lady who made the original booking.  They:

Insisted I pay for a child coming later that day who was not mine.
Insisted on ID (thankfully I had a copy of my passport photo)
Boom gate code was invalid.
Went hunting for a father who dropped off food for his son in our group to remove him from the park (which took him 5 minutes maximum).
Questioned repeatedly if I actually owned my car.
I appreciate there are many people who don't pay for access to this park, but to subject a paying guest to this seemed lacking in courtesy and manners.
I will avoid returning. The manager who took over was really lovely but the lady who I initially dealt with would benefit from training (including Australian State phone codes).

Response to reply.

I appreciated the kind manners of the manager who intervened. It's fine to check the original booking but to have staff who are unable to identify an Australian 03 code as being national and not international strongly indicates training is required.  The management had a professional manner but the receptionist I initially dealt was lacking in this respect.  I also felt the "swooping" on a father who dropped a lunch off was overboard. Time is better spent providing staff with a list of Australian State codes so they can accurately identify them as such and reminding them just because a guest is local, does not mean they have not paid or are not willing to pay.

We had a wonderful holiday here. Our cabin was really comfortable. The pool and water slides were great. There were plenty of activities, great food trucks, and the location is very handy. We would definitely stay here again.

A must go to for a family holiday, the weather was amazing, the resort was absolutely fantastic/ one stop shop, water slides, pools for all ages, night time critters tour, Maddy the braiding lady, movie nights and everyone who worked there was so friendly and helpful.
Best holiday resort!!

Where do I start!!!  This place is fantastic. Everything about it. We got lucky and was a little quite for a couple of days.. but even when busy it was still okay. The service of the  ladies at the front desk was awesome.  Highly recommend this place!

Had a lovely stay here with the kids, very clean and comfortable cottage. Kids love the bunkbed and the waterpark with 13 slides are absolute blast and highlight for the kids. We feed the farm animals and ducks there too which is nice. There is daily activities schedules which you can join too. Convinient location to Airlie Beach with parking spots. Highly recommend

Right next to the airport. Actually, you are almost sleeping on the runway. Very, very noisy early in the morning with the tours planes leaving to the Great Barrier Reef..

The campsite itself is okay. Nothing exceptional. Very busy.
Un lugar muy lindo y súper tranquilo

I'm extremely disappointed with the attitude of an employee at this establishment. After forgetting to pay for a night — a mistake on my part that I came to correct immediately — she kicked me out in an aggressive and unprofessional manner. Instead of having a respectful conversation, she chose to humiliate me with disrespectful comments about my level of English, which felt discriminatory and inappropriate.

It was an older, rather heavy-set woman with blue eyes. Her bitter and condescending attitude left me with a very negative impression. I even had doubts about the sincerity of the name she gave me, (Dany) adding to the overall sense of unprofessionalism.

I understand the importance of following rules, but a bit of professionalism and empathy wouldn't hurt. I do not recommend this place to anyone looking for a minimum of respect and hospitality.

We came down to Airlie for a little birthday weekend treat and have had the best few days. Communication with staff/management has been amazing. We arrived late on our first day because of weather and they made it super easy for us. Rooms are a little dated but they are clean and comfy. We booked a pet friendly studio and our dog also enjoyed his stay. We loved being able to walk over to the little airport cafe next door (great coffee) and my son loved the pool. Planes come and go pretty quick and are truly not disruptive or overly loud. Nice and close to town. We will for sure be back!
Black butcher birds I never heard of them before.

Nice and cheap campspot. We had an unpowered site for 24$ per night (per vehicle). You have a camp kitchen with fridge, bbq and charger!! Clean bathrooms and nice showers. Would recommend for visiting Airlie Beach.

SKIP THIS PLACE
Dirty moldy cabin ,
Location was two far out of town.
Just disgusting. Do not stay here. Filthy dirty and mould ridden.
Un lugar tranquilo,instalaciones adecuadas, Excelente servicio,super recomendado
Awesome spot to camp for a week. Safe clean and friendly staff.
Absolutely good one
Great location, buses outside the campsite to airlie beach. WiFi not great and showers could be upgraded. Right beside the airstrip handy if you want to skydive or flight over whitsundays

I stayed at the Eco Park for a few days over the New Years. We chose this spot as the photos showed a well perfect location, amenities and rooms.   Unfortunately this is not what was provided.

Firstly the positives. The location is what we chose for our family. Out of the hussle and bussle of Airlie Beach. A short drive to everything that Airlie has to offer.  The pool was perfect and relaxing with enough room for a few families etc.

However the room was not what was envisioned. The beds were comfortable but that’s where it ended. As per the photos there was dust everywhere, mould on the roof in the lounge room, mound in the toilet and bathroom roof, mould in the shower and shelves. Door in the bathroom needs some attention. Found a few cockroaches that passed their used by dates. The front veranda was missing handrails and our young children couldn’t use it was as the veranda had a drop off onto rocks and onto a private driveway which is dangerous. Back of the door displayed the emergency exits and showed a ninja park and jumping pillow which was MIA.

The unit definitely needs a spruce up and cleaner needs to be either replaced or retrained.

Booked a whole weeks stay could only handle one night between the dirty room ( brown stains all over the lounge and spider webs in every corner of the room and the last tenant food and rubbish left under the lounge and bunk beds dirty cutlery only good thing was the aircon worked  ) and all sand flies getting inside with all the doors and windows closed we had to go book another room in town and spend another couple of thousand ,

Do yourselfs a favour and don’t stay here unless you need the airport that’s located directly behind it it’s not worth it.

There’s nothing to fault here!  No wonder they’ve received so many awards.  We stayed in a 2 bed cabin.  They’re modern and clean.  The service was great.  😊
The park had so much on for children, they could be entertained all day.  The pools and waterslide park are fabulous! Even adults can use them.  🛝
The reception staff are super!  They helped with booking of tours etc.  They’re all ready to help. The grounds staff and cleaners are also friendly.  There’s no doubt we would book again.  👍🏻
Woolworths is close by for convenience as well.

We left our accommodation today after six nights here. There were 10 adults and 11 kids in our group. This park is fantastic with the water slides for all of us to enjoy, the massive pool, petting zoo and local food vans at night.

Would highly recommend this park for anyone wanting to kick back and enjoy.

Given Airlie Beach is more about parties, pubs and backpackers the Big4 makes it affordable and fun for families particularly if you have a budget to stick to. The park has heaps of stuff to do with kids in mind. That is if you can get them out of the water park. The facilities are well presented and all of the staff seem happy to be here. Take a trip into Airlie for a day of fun, its only a short drive then come kick back for movie night on the grass.
Absolutely brilliant place to spend time. Kids loved it. Safe and secure.

Best BIG4 Park in Queensland! The Wheelchair accessible cabin I used was very close to the water park and the accessibility around the park is amazing. The pool hoist setup around the main pool is easy to access! The kids had a blast, making friends and taking part in all the activities available. We will be back!

Water slides are good and thats the only good part. Cabin is so smelly cant step out and breathe fresh air. Major concerning problem is black mold in water park. It should be addressed  considering safety standards in australia.its unhygenic. Its total no no
Staff are lovely.cabin was exceptional. Park was very fun for the kids.would love to go back when it isn't the wet season.

We had a stay with 17 family members, ages from 1 year old to 80 yrs old. The staff here from maintenance, customer service, cleaning just every single one of them are AMAZING! My 80 year old Dad was with us, not the greatest health or mobility & ANY literally ANY extra help we asked for to help get him around & make his stay as enjoyable as ours was always done straight away, never did any of us feel that we were a burden on his behalf. ALL of their staff are PHENOMENAL! As far as the park being a kid friendly one, ABSOLUTELY but it caters to EVERYONE. If you plan on going thinking the slides are just for the kids, think again - all 17 of us had not 1 thing to complain about ever. It is by far the most laid back, fun place i have ever visited. Can not thank them enough for the extra support with our Dad. THANK YOU - WE WILL BE BACK xxxxx
Great location , lovely team that work there. Staff were really nice and very helpful. The park is beautiful and well maintained. Will definately go there again.

Great place for family. Don't need to leave everything is there. Great pool and slide kept kids entertained all day. Close to shops. Rooms were extremely clean. Staff are friendly and patient. Definitely recommend

Awesome place to stay and has so much to do.
The waterpark is a highlight but lots of little activities happening each day.
Waterpark hours could be extended to allow people to have dinner then have some fun but that doesn’t lessen the experience.
Our cabin (C26) was great and has everything you need and being located right next to the waterpark was perfect. Gets a little warm on the deck on humid nights and could do with an outside fan to help keep everyone cool.
The BBQ on the deck was also great and allowed for a lot of cooking outside whilst we socialised.
On-site cafe offers plenty of things to grab during the day.
Big highlight was the staff who go out of their way to help you with everything you need.
The assistance they provided with my father was amazing and picked him up multiple times in the golf cart and moved him around the park.
Park is in a very good location with a supermarket a short walk away, pub and bottle shop across the road and bus stop out the front to get you into Airlie township.
Can’t wait to visit again

We recently stayed at BIG4 Adventure Park Airlie Beach and experienced some truly exceptional care from the staff.
Unfortunately, the weather turned severe with heavy rain late in the afternoon, leaving our tents and all bedding completely soaked. We contacted reception to let them know what had happened and explained that, at that point, we were preparing to sit under a tarp overnight.
Reception asked what our plans were and offered us a cabin for the night. The cost was understandably high, and due to circumstances beyond our control, we simply couldn’t afford it. We explained that one member of our group is not currently working due to personal issues, and another has also been diagnosed with cancer.
What happened next was nothing short of extraordinary.
The staff kindly offered us the cabin for the night at no cost. The following day, once the rain had eased, it became clear our campsite was beyond repair — tent and gazebo poles had snapped under the weight of the water, and the tents were destroyed.
At this point, Sandy at reception and the wider BIG4 team went above and beyond once again. They arranged for us to stay in the bunkhouse (normally used for school camps), washed and dried all of our wet bedding, and consistently checked in to make sure we were okay and comfortable.
This level of genuine care, compassion, and humanity is something we have never experienced before. It meant more to us than words can properly express.
A heartfelt thank you to Sandy, the staff who helped with our washing, management for their kindness, and all the behind-the-scenes team members who supported us. You turned a very difficult situation into a reminder of how powerful kindness can be. We will never forget it.
Amazing stay! Great service and facilities! Helpful and friendly staffs.

Great place for the kids , waterpark awesome.
Go karts so much fun.
Love the food vans and activities coming every night.
Big 4 Airlie Beach all the way. Great staff and facilities are fantastic to wear out the kids & adults !! Lots of activities 🤩

Absolutely loved our time at this Big 4, the kids had the best time at the pools, the mini golf is awesome, the trike hire super cute and we enjoyed our petting zoo experience. But hands down, having an ASD son, the sensory room was a game changer. Said with the deepest gratitude for being so thoughtful - having this space to recharge allowed us to have full days’ of fun and not have to leave early. It was just amazing. Helpful staff and lovely facilities.
Great place to stay for the whole family. Lots of activities, great location and staff that go above and beyond.

Absolutely loved this Big4 Park! There was heaps to do for the kids and we were sufficiently entertained with activities for the week that we stayed. Its proximity to Airlie Beach and access to the Whitsunday Islands was ideal for day trips, Whitehaven Beach was a highlight.

We recently stayed for a week in a two-bedroom spa cottage with our kids aged 13, 15, and 17. The cottage looked quite worn and old, with all table surfaces wiped clean, but the main bedroom cupboard was dusty and damp at the bottom. Dust from months was visible along all the carpet edges, giving it an unclean appearance. The bathroom tiles had ingrained dirt needing more than a simple wipe, and the bathroom door was also dirty. Some Pillow slips in kids room had black marks and the room smelt mouldy.  This was a cabin at a caravan park, costing nearly $5,000 for the week—over $650 per night—and it lacked a cutting board with limited utensils. The damaged pan made cooking difficult without sticking or burning. The kitchen cupboard door was crooked and fell off on the last day. Overall, we were quite disappointed given the price. I don't usually write negative reviews, but I am doing so this time to help others. If I had seen such a review, I wouldn't have booked this place considering the quoted price. Our hamilton island stay the week before was cheaper for the same amount of time at the Whitsunday apartments and the facilities were even better.
The rest of the caravan park however was great, so was the staff.
We gad a good time camping there and it's perfect if you don't mind the planes taking off and landing in the morning which didn't seem to bother us

Nous y sommes restés 4 jours. Très bon camping avec des emplacements qualitatifs et un personnel très sympa. Les parties communes sont propres dans l’ensemble mais elles méritent un rajeunissement. Le bruit de l’aéroport n’est pas nuisible !
Very nice campsite. Great amenities including a pool.

Wir bekamen den hintersten Platz auf dem Campingplatz zugewiesen obwohl 50% leer waren. Die Toilette und Dusche waren sauber, leider die Küche jedoch überhaupt nicht. Es gab auch kein Spülmittel oder Seife im Küchenbereich. Und die einzige Herdplatte wurde nicht sehr heiß.
Von einem gewohnten Big4-Standard weit entfernt.
Der Flughafen nebenan ist tagsüber SEHR laut.
Stayed for 3 nights in October. The room was clean and comfortable. The bed was excellent as was the shower .

The staff here were lovely and helpful and all facilities including pool were always well cleaned.
The beds were comfortable and kitchen in cabins were well equipped.
It's a 10 mins drive from town so you definitely need a car to stay here, but it pays to stay further out as it was more relaxing and quiet away from the hustle and bustle.
We stayed in a dog friendly cabin and found it good value for money.

Perfect location as we are using the airstrip alongside the park. So easy and cheap to catch the bus when looking around or doing shopping. All staff have been great! Friendly and hardworking, the park and cabins we were in, were all very clean and tidy. Well fitted with what we needed. Looking forward to stay next winter again if it works out that way.

Der Camping ist ok, hat uns aber nicht umgehauen.
- Die Küche und Toiletten waren nicht immer sauber.
- Ausserdem ist der Park doch sehr abgeschottet. Der öffentliche Bus ist mit 0.50 Cent zwar sehr günstig, fährt aber nur tagsüber in die Stadt. Abends gibt es nichts zu tun vor Ort.
Eine weitere Info: Der Fluglärm ist doch beträchtlicher als wir gedacht haben. Aufgrund der Nähe zum Flugplatz ist das aber kein Grund für Punkteabzug.

What a great place to stay with cabins tent sites and shade filled van site. It has clean Toilets and showers. Movie night with fire pits and a food van to supply hot food and junk food. It out of the hustle and bustle but dose back onto the airport with is great for the fifo holiday makes but if you want more quiet book done the front.

This campground was very pleasant, the scenery was beautiful, and the amenities were very clean. The price for one night on a powered site for 2 people is $25, which is not very expensive compared to other campgrounds we have visited.
If I had to choose a downside, I would say that it’s not located near the center, and the nearby airfield can be a bit noisy during the day. The staff members were very friendly.
I highly recommend it for its great value for money.

Great location, cheap for a powered site ( 25 $ for a night ). It's cheaper than all the other camping we booked.
The amenities are very clean and the staff is very friendly.
The place is gorgeous, but just a little far from the city.
A little noisy with the airport next to the camping but that was not a issue for us.
Definitely recommend it.

Nice caravan park. You won’t get a sleep in because it’s right next to the airport and the planes start before 7am
Nice and clean amenities.
Powered caravan sites are adequate
Nice quiet caravan park a little out of town but would stay again
Generous sites,  a little hard reversing up the rise to get to the level ground.  Beautiful and clean.  The little aerodrome not an issue with us.  Would recommend to my friends.

5 Sterne für die freundliche Dame an der Rezeption. Wir waren eigentlich nur in Airlie Beach, um an einer Tagestour zu den Whitsundays teilzunehmen und zu schnorcheln. Leider wurde die Tour wegen schlechten Wetters abgesagt. Die Rezeptionistin hat mit uns spontan ein alternatives Tagesprogramm zusammengestellt, ist dabei auf unsere Vorlieben eingegangen und hat sich viel Zeit gelassen. Am Ende hat sie uns damit sehr viel Geld gespart, weil alle Alternativtouren nicht gewesen wären, was wir wollten. Stattdessen hat sie uns einen Geheimtipp an der Küste verraten und wir haben uns die teuren Touren gespart, um später bei Cairns noch Budget zu haben und das Schnorchelabenteuer nachzuholen. Danke dafür!

Our first stay at BIG4 Whitsundays was fantastic. We upgraded from a studio cabin to a 2-bedroom cabin and it was extremely comfortable and spacious. Amenities were great and very clean, the staff provided excellent service, and the big water park was amazing. The pools were cleaned every day and looked perfect. Highly recommend

An amazing place for the whole family to stay.  the kids  absolutely loved the water park, cabins were clean and spacious, All staff were lovely and there are shops eg. Woolworths/ big w in walking distance. The Airlie beach main strip is about a 10 min bus ride which the bus is located right outside the front of the park. When staying in cabins.. opting for a cabin the opens up from the front of the park and faces the waterpark (eg cabins 33 and 34) are the way to go because they provide light and a nice feel inside whereas there are a few that face the back and are more covered with shade and do not provide the same vibe ( eg cabin 35). just as a side note.
Overall loved our stay and would definetly stay at the Big 4 Whitsunday resort again :)

Cabin 38 was a great and comfortable.
Location was great, right near the pool.
Only feedback/suggestion is we could have used some siccors, extra batteries and a mixer/blender.

What a great park for kids, I think the supervision for kids should be 10 and younger - 12  and under seems a little restrictive.
The facilities were outstanding - the amenities block was huge, shower heads were amazing, lots of hooks to hang things and a bench which was away from the shower - and a mirror WOWEE!!
The dump point was really cool haven’t seen one like this before - being a physio though - would be hard for an older person to lift up onto the bench maybe.
Washing machines did a great job and to have a basket with the trolley - great
Putt putt was cool as and super shady
Pool slides entertained our kids for hours
Jumping pillow awesome - except closing at 530 just when it’s cooling off sucks ( kids were told because neighbours complained about noise) - pfttt it’s what happens when you buy next to a caravan park
Sensory room for ASD - awesome
Garden spectacular

Only criticism - the sits need a bit of loving with grass - lots of dirt - I know it’s the time of year and busy but that’s what’s great - grass ( slabs were great too)

Thank you so much Big 4 adventure Whitsundays for making my 40th amazing!
I can't recommend this resort enough! I've stayed at many and this one is by my fave. The staff are very friendly and helpful. Massive shout out to Ash ❤️ She went above and beyond to help us. We will be back 🐢❤️
Thanks for having us 🙏

Ash at reception was absolutely lovely and went above and beyond to make our stay ❤️  park was clean and well maintained. Ample staff to help with any requests. Grounds men helpful when we needed a bit of a head on hook up to leave. Food lovely. Pool clean.

This is a lovely Big4 Campsite with lots of lush vegetation, big sites and absolutely delightful. Helpful reception staff. Although we didn't use it, the pool looked fantastic, especially for children and the shower/toilet block was always spotlessly clean, as was the kitchen area. The on site food vans were useful too; we had the Thai food but on other nights pizza or Korean food was available. There is a shopping centre only 5mins walk away and the Woolworths had everything we wanted.
The only downside to this fab site is the distance to Airline Beach, or indeed any beach. We walked the 7km to the Port of Airline (and back!) which was tiring in the heat. However, there are frequent buses from outside the camp and they cost only 50c per person to get you there, a much better plan!
We are a retired couple and loved this site and area but children will go mad for it given the pool, water slides and play areas. Fantastic!

We had such a wonderful stay! The swimming area was amazing, and the slides kept the kids entertained for hours. There were so many different sports to play, and the mini golf was a great bonus. The cabins were large and comfortable, and we were very thankful for the upgrade.

The staff were friendly and communicated really well via text, which made everything super easy. The rooms were clean, and we loved the great selection of nightly food vans.

We definitely recommend staying here. The kids had an absolute ball and were never bored!
Great place to stay, friendly staff
Amazing place for Kids, caravan sites are spacious and easy to put/ reverse van into.

We absolutely loved our stay in the Premium 2 Bedroom Cottage at Big4 Airlie Beach. The cottage was spotless, beautifully presented, and surprisingly spacious — perfect for families or couples traveling together. The beds were incredibly comfortable, and the modern amenities made it feel like a true home away from home.

The balcony was a highlight, offering a peaceful spot to enjoy morning coffee while taking in the tropical surroundings. The kitchen was well-equipped, making it easy to prepare meals, and the air-conditioning kept the whole space cool and comfortable.

The holiday park itself is fantastic, with friendly staff, great facilities, and a relaxed atmosphere. The pool area was a big hit, and the location is ideal — just a short drive to the heart of Airlie Beach and all the Whitsunday adventures.

Highly recommend this cottage for anyone looking for comfort, convenience, and a touch of luxury during their stay in Airlie Beach. We can’t wait to come back! 🌴✨
The best
Camping agréable et ombragé. La piscine et équipements aquatiques sont conséquents. Les équipements de cuisine sont plutôt bien. Nous avons passé un bon moment et le personnel était bien.
Beautiful big 4 and lovely staff especially the one at reception when she found out its my birthday she give me champagne very feel welcome and the kids love the water park definitely we will be back

An Exceptional Stay at BIG4 Whitsundays – Truly Above and Beyond!!!
From the moment I made my booking, I knew we were in for something special. The service from the BIG4 Whitsundays team was outstanding right from the start, but what followed genuinely exceeded every expectation. Upon arrival, we were pleasantly surprised with an upgrade — the first of many thoughtful touches that made our stay unforgettable.
I also want to extend my sincere apologies if I’ve gotten her name wrong, but I believe it was Imogen who assisted us at reception. She was, without question, one of the best staff members I have ever encountered anywhere. The moment I walked through the door, it was obvious that she genuinely cared. When she learned that I was reuniting with a high school friend I hadn’t seen in at least 15 years, she celebrated the moment with us by gifting a bottle of bubbles — such a kind, personal gesture that meant the world.
Our accommodation was exceptional. The rooms had everything we needed and more, presented beautifully, and even included a packet of Tim Tams as a sweet welcome surprise. It truly felt like every detail had been considered to make our stay comfortable and memorable.
The holiday park itself is next-level amazing. The huge waterpark caters for all ages, complete with the coolest waterslides that kept everyone entertained for hours. There are daily activities for the whole family, plus visits from their adorable little animal residents that add even more charm to the place. Every part of the grounds and facilities is immaculate — clearly very well cared for by a team that takes pride in the experience they offer.
Our stay at BIG4 Whitsundays was worth every penny and then some. We will absolutely be back — in fact, we genuinely can’t wait. Highly, highly recommend to anyone looking for an unforgettable family getaway in the Whitsundays.
Loved our stay here!!

My partner and I are backpackers, and the night before staying here we were absolutely eaten alive by sandflies!! Because of that, we came to the park asking for some kind of shelter...and the team couldn’t have been more helpful.

They were incredibly friendly and immediately offered us a solution. We were even able to check into a cabin earlier than the official check-in time, which we appreciated so much.

A huge shoutout to the team for being so kind, cooperative, and understanding. Thank you for really helping us out when we needed it most!

Didn't stay here but booked a site for a day so we could use the facilities - mainly the water slides and pool. Came back the next morning to feed the farm animals before "checking out". Great facilities and ambience. Perfect for families.

We only stayed here for one night , but we will definitely be back. The cabin we stayed it was absolutely pristine great job cleaning team and the staff especially Sandy were so welcoming and friendly. What a beautiful team thank you for making our stay so wonderful 🤩🤩
Awesome Park!! Has everything you could need for a great trip.

Overall we had a good stay. We just stayed there for a night. We got there after hours, but we didn’t get a code to get the key. It’s a bit far from the centre. Room was clean and they give you some tim tam and milk and also some discount tickets for nearby cafés.

Had an incredible experience at Big4 Whitsunday Resort. Our 3-bedroom Whitehaven Condo was impeccably clean and well maintained. These units have everything you need + more. They have obviously put a lot of thought and effort into the entire experience, and our young family had an amazing time.

The rooms are very well equipped, loads of plates, cutlery, cups etc alongside A/C, fans, tv's in each room. The resort has excellent amenities for families. From the slides, to pools, playground, jumping pillow to outdoor cinema - this place really caters to families very well.

Thank you to the entire team for looking after us so well. We will be back!

The resort has excellent amenities for families. From the slides, to pools, playground, jumping pillow to outdoor cinema - this place really caters to families very well. ||Thank you to the entire team for looking after us so well. We will be back!||Rick

Our kids thoroughly enjoyed the pool area, slides and karts. This was the best part of our stay. They really had a ball playing in the pool. The little cafe near the pools staff were amazing and the cocktails were delicious.
However, The reception staff were impolite, including the manager, who was very condescending when asking for clarification on the $20 visitors day fee. The policy that you’re directed to in the email sent by the park regarding the parks policies completely contradicts what is written in the agreement. When the manager came out to speak with me, she said that given the information is in the Q&A section, their “visitor policy” section wasn’t valid. The visitor policy states visitors are welcome and the $20 fee is applicable to guests using the facilities only but it is not the case. The manager condescendingly said “thanks for bringing the policy wording to our attention and they’ll get it changed” however there was no acknowledgement that their own policy was completely contradictory and a major factor in our guests deciding to come to visit. Very disappointing. We also had so many green ants at our site that we had to get pest spray out to try and kill them before they took over the slab and our outdoor area. The jumping pillows had no shade however a sign did say it is coming soon but it was too hot on the kids feet. Not all slides were in action at the pool either. The animal feeding was booked out which was a shame and the play ground needs some upkeep. Given the kids had an amazing time, we will likely revisit and hope to see some improvement in the facilities and some more compassion from staff during interactions with guests. The manager let me know during our conversation that she managed the reviews which felt like a weird statement to make, almost like it wouldn’t matter what review I gave but I think it’s important to be honest and clear in communication so hopefully they fix their policy website page to be a true reflection of their visitor policy day fee. I’ve read the repeated comments in the reviews on why they have the fee and I respect that however on one review, the reply said “there certainly are cases where we’re able to make exceptions” but we were not offered that which is another contradiction. It was my 60+yr aunty and uncle visiting for an hour and not using the facilities. Anyway, we will give the park another chance now we’re better educated on the policies and hope some upgrades have been made to the parks facilities. We’re sure the next visit, the kids will have just as much fun as they did this time. It’s a great family park!
Awesome location,  opposite shopping centre,  close to town. Love it❤️
Great for families. Waterpark is great for the kids of all ages.

We had such a great time at Big 4! The place is really clean, and you can tell they put a lot of care into everything – even little things like having Tim Tams available. The staff were friendly and helpful, making sure everything ran smoothly.

It’s a really safe place for kids to play. The massive slides were definitely the highlight, but we loved all the extra activities and the outdoor cinema too. Everything is taken care of, and it’s just such a fun place for the whole family.

Loved it so much we rebooked for same time next year!

Staff are well trained and genuinely friendly and incredibly helpful. Shoutout to Adam, Sean and the Mgr Sandy. Any issues and they will sort straight away. We got the site we had asked for even tho no guarantees, 2 wk stay. Only real bug bear is an adult pool..very geared up for children but nothing for older teens and adults who just want to chill in a relaxing tropical pool environment. But!... its happening apparently.  Very soon..a swim up bar for adults.. thanks for a great stay again and huge thank you to your great staff!
Great family holiday, full of fun . Easy Transport to Airlie. Bus every 20mins. Taxi

We had a fabulous one week stay in a 3- bedroom chalet which was very clean and well laid out for 2 couples and the 3 young kids. The kids loved the bunk beds. We loved the spacious verandah and used the BBQ provided. The pool area was amazing with slides in the main pool the highlight for young and old. Loved all the daily activities and the visiting food vans were most welcome. We could borrow board games too. The staff were so friendly and helpful. Very impressive resort.
This is the best Big4 I have stayed at. Awesome for families.

Wow what a great place to stay amazing
Staff friendly very clean and safe
Different food trucks every night yum
Walking distance to Different shops
We loved it
We stayed here for 5 nights. It was a fantastic park with so much to do. The slides were great and the amenities and grounds were clean and tidy. We loved it, thank you.

We travelled from Sydney for 7 nights with a 10 and 2 year old. Fantastic location, amazing park with so much for the kids to do. Staff were so helpful and the location is close to supermarkets, Airlie Beach etc. This place is perfect for families. We have had such a great time and plan on coming back same time next year.

Great pool. Tired faded waterslides with a few too broken to open to swimmers, but still lots of fun, especially for kids. Well laid out park with lots of shade and amenities. Pretty cramped cabin but it was what we expected. Fun activities including mini golf, go karts and others stuff, not too expensive. Very easy to catch buses to move around Airlie beach suburbs. Would stay again!
Absolutely lovely location, friendly helpful staff at reception and around the grounds. BUT…. no working washing machines in the laundry, and no plans to have them fixed!
Staff were amazing , we had a brilliant stay and spot to park lovely and shady right near a toilet block and camp kitchen. Highly recommend

I was scared to come here because of the reviews about the noise of the airplanes, however the noise it's okay, I didn't hear airplanes at all while sleeping, however my husband did hear them and woke up, So It's really depends on how sensitive you are about noise, but definitely not a problem at least for me. The room was very clean, with all the necesary to spend a great time in Airlie Beach, definitely will be back. Very quiet place specially at night time.
Really nice clean cabins,small airport at back of park, but not too noisy,only day flights

In the day time it is a little bit nosy but at night it is quiet and you will have a good sleep.The swimming pool is too small but have Saturday move and chips.As usually,busy park always has crowded parking space ，and the washing machine was broken! The last thing you will never connect to the WIFI.The service of reception is good.The staffs try their best to make people happy.

The check in staff were absolutely beautiful when we checked in. The bathrooms are very clean all the time a little dated. Not every shower has a bench. Which I found very handy as a lot of mothers would too. Park is lovely well presented. One of our family stayed in a single bed cabin unfortunately it had mould. Some caravan sites were a little tight. I feel there is a difference between pet friendly and will tolerate pets. But they were allowed here. Our first night the bbq near the pool had a sign saying not working. So we went to the camp kitchen one of the bbqs there worked but only just warmed the plate so several families had to use the only other hot plate. Next day we discovered the washing machine was broken and has been for some time. Such a shame as we really enjoyed the scenery and feel of the park. There were planes and helicopters and skydivers flying over us but that really didn't bother us or put a damper on our stay. If you do have dogs please be careful they don't eat the berries from the palm trees.
Nice caravan park, sits right next to airport so noisy planes take off from 7:00am
This lived up to the Tropical name beautiful grounds and nice large sites. Will definitely be back.
The place was organised, clean and tidy. The campground area was quiet and friendly in environment. Friendly staffs. It exceeded our expectation. Good value for money.

Overall a pretty nice caravan park

Sites were fairly large on unpowered, but the roads between sites are super narrow, so saw a lot of people struggling getting their vans into the right spot. Also had someone else nearly hit our car on our site as they were pulling out.

Amenities very large, never had to line up for a toilet or shower. Showers nice and hot, although only 2 had benches to put your things on, looked like the others had the benches ripped out of the wall. Various array of shower heads throughout, some that spray most of their water on the shelf below, rendering them basically useless.

Laundry facilities were good, although would be better if 4 out 4 of the washing machines were actually working rather than only 2.

Be warned, it is right next to the airport and tourist planes and choppers take off and land all throughout the day, not just 'occasionally' as some reviews suggest. The unpowered sites are right on that fenceline as well, so you get the full noise. They do stop maybe about 5:30/6pm ish, but start up again at about 7am

The site is organised and clean but the reception is a bit weird. I paid for 1 night and they told me if you want to extend let us know before 10 am. I went to the office at 9 and it was closed. I went for an explore in the town and kept calling them all day in order to extend my stay but they never picked up the phone. I came back at 5 pm and the office was still closed and no staff at all so I had to find another site for my 2nd night.
Small, obtuse and irregular caravan bays. Soft and slippery when wet. Airplanes and helicopters taking off within metres - do not stay here unless you are an aircraft fan AND/OR deaf.

Good amenities. $40pp/pn a little high for an unpowered site. Location right next to the airport, engine fumes visibly waft into the camp area.

I wonder who came first, the airport or the caravan park.

The team were very accommodating with us accidentally parking in the wrong site and allowing a late check-out on our departure.
Nice location, not too far from town.
Looking at the site sizes, I could imagine the place would become rather squishy when busy. Also, if you like sleep-ins, be aware that it backs onto the airport.

It's a well kept park and we really enjoyed our stay but it is far to town (have to drive no pedestrians allowed) and it is litterally right next to the airstrip, planes start at 7am and finish at 6pm. Staff where friendly and the park grounds are great. Good value for money. We would recommend it to others.

Great accommodation with wonderfully helpful staff. You can't walk to town, but  there is a bus stop out the front with a regular bus service (they only take cash). The Jubalee Tavern is great for a family dinner with a free courtesy bus to pick you up and drop you home again. I definitely recommend this accommodation to others who want to enjoy a relaxed holiday.

Der Campingplatz an sich ist ganz schön. Sauber, gepflegt, schöne Camp Kitchen. Aber die Lage ist wirklich schlecht - direkt neben einem Flugplatz, von welchem Rundflüge starten. Ab 6 Uhr morgens ist die Ruhe vorbei (auf dem Foto hinter der grünen Metallwand liegt der Flugplatz).

I would have honestly preferred to stay in a standard hotel where I could have had housekeeping daily and closer to Airlie beach town. We were there for 5 nights and our room did not get cleaned once. The door of the bathroom was broken, the shower head had absolutely no power. There is free mini golf and tennis, however you have to pay for tennis ball and golf balls. I know it’s not much but when you pays almost $500 a night it’s the little things. I have been to other big 4 where they have lots of fun activities at night such as bingo but all the kids could do was a movie night at 7:15 which is quite late and for some of the movies that were showing it was too dark for them to see the screen. The sensory room was amazing though. My kids loved it.

An excellent family holiday destination. The resort is so well thought out. There are activities every day for the kids, food trucks, plus all the in-house stuff like water park, pool, playground, animal park, jumping pillows, mini golf, sports courts, cart hire, etc.
The staff were great. The amenities clean and new. The cost is high but worth it. We will definitely return.
This place is awesome

Ein sehr schöner und sauberer Platz mit durch Palmen separierten Stellplätzen. Den Wasserpark haben wir nicht genutzt, aber hier möchte man wieder Kind sein! Da in QLD zum Besuchszeitpunkt Fruhlingsferien waren, waren viele Kinder auf dem Platz. Dies sollte man wissen, aber uns hat das zu keiner Zeit gestört.
Die Sanitäranlagen waren stets sauber.
Wenn wir die Ostküste erneut bereisen, wäre dieser Platz mit “dabei”

Just had a powered site. My specific one was tiny but most others looked well sized.
Toilets and showers were clean.
Water park was awesome.
Had a good rest

I don't know how your board at the front of the park on has 4.5 stars. It's 5 all the way.  As the Blues Brothers once said, 'this place has everything'. I'm a bit sad our kids are in their 20s now, as they would have loved this place. So much to do - massive pool and splash park with slides, mini golf, volleyball, soccer pitch, animal farm, daily activities down by the pool, friendly and the hardest working staff I've ever seen (there working till well after dark) and food trucks most nights|Beautiful surroundings to wake up to. Only slight negative were those birds and their annoying cry at times. Maybe that's why missing the half a star. A 10 out 10! Will be back at some stage!

I don't know where you are missing half a star on your board out the front. As the Blues Brothers once said, 'This place has everything'.
Amazing caravan park. So much for the kids to do, massive pool and splash park, mini golf, volleyball, soccer pitch, night movies, animal farm etc. and beautiful surroundings. 10 out 10!
Fantastic park. Lots of fun things to do with the kids. Tom fell in love with mini golf there and never stopped

Could not recommend this place enough especially if you have a young family! Absolutely amazing resort with so many activities to keep the little ones amused and the cabins are so well equipped and spacious. From a mini golf course to a petting zoo, an awesome pool with water slides for all ages (our 2 year old gained so much extra confidence playing on them) and the kids club which had all kinds of activities ready to book in anytime. Also loved that they had a variety of food trucks that came on specific days/nights. Will definitely be coming back in the future ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Great little spot - lots of fun activities for the little ones.

Pools are on the cold side which is the only drawback.
This place was amazing. Well run with super friendly staff, plenty for the kids to do and a great atmosphere.
Top quality accommodation & service. Great facilities for families in particular.
Great caravan park, the kids loved the slides. Our cabin was clean, modern, everything you need. The sites look good for the vans too so will be back with the van one day!

I have no hesitation on reviewing this park. We had a caravan site for a few days and loved the tropical setting as well as some shade trees. The park is beautifully maintained as is the ablution block. Looking forward to our next visit
Hired a powered campsite for a night. Beautiful tropical surroundings. Lovely pool, clean shower and toilets. Great value for money and centrally located. Lovely park for families
For a room that sleeps 10 people, found there was not enough utensils/tea towels washing towels and etc.
Excellent, clean, fresh, very enjoyable to stay.

It used to be awesome. Went there multiple times. Now the manager has changed and there is  othing for kids, barely a playground fully under the sun. Nothing except a pool. The bathrooms aren't as clean as those used to be. The staff and specially manager weren't really nice. Girls at receptions are very nice tho. Near the boat ramp good for putting the boat in. Otherwise far from everything.
We stayed in a studio villa for a nice weekend away. Check in process was easy as we got in after hours and the villas were clean and comfortable with everything you need! Would stay again 🙂

Riddled with cockroaches. Literally had them falling on us as we laid in bed. Door always remand shut and rubbish was taken out daily so no reason from us. Wifi absolutely did not work and the airport being so close by meant we were up early every morning. We were given one roll of toilet paper for a week and when we asked for more the lady at the front seat gave a lecture about how we should have brought our own. Our bathroom door didn’t close so had no privacy while showering.

The place was beautiful, but our room was pretty dirty, there was a pacifier underneath the table and half of the dishes were still dirty when we arrived.
The power went out multiple times, the furniture would shake at really odd times of the day and the food truck gave one of the people staying with us food poisoning.
Ziet er allemaal netjes uit!

Stayed in July this year but have waited to post this review. If you like sleeping in on your holiday this is definitely not the park for you. Airport starts at 6:00 am, and they will no doubt reply saying they don’t have big planes but hey I woke up everyday as a result. The unpowered section is a lovely dolomite not grass as described and god help you if you arrive before 2:00 pm to check in. We arrived at 12:00. Flat out no even though our site was empty… was directed to drive back to Airlie Beach to wait for our site to be ready by 2:00. Not their fault but also had backpackers going into our site drunk and procreating in rooftoppers till 4:00 am. Planes started again at 6:00!
