When we asked when they would be leaving so we could possibly make other arrangements was told “today but I think they want to stay another night, maybe I’ll see if I can move them” sorry no. Airlie is stunning but this place is let down by poor management and location.

Great resort! The only downfall was it is located a bit far out of city limits so you cannot walk into town, but you can catch a cab for a relatively low cost! Great pool and the bathrooms/showers and camp kitchen were all super clean!
The staff super kind, the price was awesome.

A little out of town,  so you need to drive or organise alternative - there is a bus stop right out front if needed.
Had an ensuite cabin.
Cabins are affordable and have all you need as a home base - also very clean and shower pressure amazing.  Staff were lovely and friendly.

Realmente nos sorprendió. Todo muy limpio, amplio. Facilidad para instalar la caravana y la cabaña estupenda! Con todas las necesidades posibles y cama súper cómoda y grande. El mejor camping que he visitado

Eine der säubersten Camping Anlagen, die ich hier an der Ostküste gebucht habe. Waren dort an einem Wochenende und im Pool Bereich hatte es sehr viele Familien, dementsprechend war es auch laut. Mich störte dies weniger. In der Anlage selbst war es ruhig. Kritikpunkt: kein Zugang zum Meer/ Strand, hab ich wohl beim Buchen übersehen.

The staff were more than helpful especially "Ashlyn" who stayed back late to assist us with our queries in her own time.
The facilities and grounds were always kept clean, neat and tidy, & the bird life, such as curlews, bush turkeys and several types of ducks as well as many other native birds just far too many to mention here was just amazing. They also catered well for families with children, lots to keep them occupied.
The only downside was the midges & sand Flys which at this time of year can prove to be a pest.
Overall, great value for money.
Great

We had an awesome stay at BIG4! Everything was clean and well looked after. Our little one had the best time on the waterslides and in the pool. The staff were super friendly and made us feel at home. Perfect family spot – we’ll definitely be back!

Well, you can’t do much better than this for our resort with family and friends. The staff go out of their way to show high energy and ensure you are enjoying your stay the facility offers. Nothing but great fun a lot of extras for free. There are plenty of things for kids to do including activities the park runs, and the swimming pool is gorgeous. Thank you. You will be visiting again
This is an incredible place to come with the kids. The only problem is that the resort is SO fantastic, it's hard to leave to explore the rest of the glorious Whitsundays and surrounds!
We loved our stay here, clean cabin, good beds, helpful and friendly staff, great pool, activity list and facilities, just awesome!
Great layout, and very well maintained. Fantastic place to keep the kids entertained

Dure campingfabriek met zeer veel kinderanimatie, erg slechte wifi en bereik. Je voelt weinig warmte van de uitbating. Verouderde douches, weinig aminities voor de vele gasten, maar wel alles wat je nodig hebt op een camping dichtbij de cruises van de withsunday eilanden. De foto’s zijn veel meer belovend dan de realiteit. Je voelt je een nummertje op de camping ipv een gast. De extra services die ze aanbieden zijn ook geen garantie, noch betrouwbaar. We hadden hier een massage geboekt en bleek dat de masseuse gewoon naar huis vertrokken was zonder iets te melden. Je betaald veel geld voor een stukje gras en een kleine waterglijbaan. Niet de standaard die we van Big 4 gewend zijn

We stayed 5 nights in a cabin and absolutely loved it. There were activities planned for the kids most days. The pool and waterpark was clean and well maintained. It’s conveniently located and walkable to eateries, shops and Woolies.

I must note the hospitality was fantastic. My child was unwell and needed new bedding. I called in the morning and they picked up and provided clean bedding immediately and came back with more. The staff were just so courteous and caring.

What a fantastic place! We just got back from a week long stay here. We had the best time!

On arrival our room was great well equipment and everything was clean, tidy and in great condition. Being able to get a Cole’s delivery taken to our room for arrival was amazing. It took so much pressure off with kids needing snacks as soon as we got there.

The reception called to check in on us the day after arrival which was a great bit of service even though there was nothing to report.

The facilities was fabulous our kids 3 and 6 had such fun on the water slides, mini golf, animal park, sports equipment hire and the go karts. The heated pool was a plus for us adults that can feel the cold unlike the kids 😂. The kids did a couple of the kids club activities which were great little additions too.

Onsite food trucks daily and a little shop at the reception for the essentials was super handy.

Booking tours with the park was easy and there was discount codes to use too which was amazing.

Overall we had an amazing time and would recommend staying here to anyone.
Great place we stayed in our van very nice people that run the place highly recommended
附近有餐馆超市加油站，很方便，但是离小镇有一段距离，需要开车或者的士前往。
모든게 너무 좋았어요~ 아이들 놀거리도 잘 되어있고 깨끗하고 엑테비티도 많아서 좋아요. 기회가 되면 또 오고 싶네요^^
Had a family holiday 2 cabin upgrades ++ kids had a ball, so much for them to do, we will definitely be back with our caravan

Great cabins! Great for the kids. Only issue i had was i asked for my room to be made up and all i got was a few fresh towels and 2 loo rolls left on my outdoor tables, other then that had a great time here all staff members friendly and helpful

We only stayed 1 night after a yacht charter but this place is awesome.   There’s a great pool area (bring your own towels) with slides.  Also mini golf, the jumping pillow and petting zoo.  So much fun for the kids!
Amazing, the sensory room is perfect, and there is so much to do! Food options are amazing.
Great place to take kids and very comfortable
Great park! Very friendly and accommodating. Highly recommend.

We had a fantastic stay at BIG4 Adventure Whitsunday Resort and would like to express our heartfelt thanks to the entire team.

From the moment we arrived, the reception staff were welcoming, helpful, and professional, making check-in smooth and pleasant. The Christmas in July event was beautifully organised, a big thank you to everyone involved in creating such a magical experience for all guests!

A special thank you goes to Jana, the cleaner who prepared our room. Everything was spotless, and we truly appreciated the care taken to ensure our accommodation was perfectly clean and comfortable.

We’re already looking forward to returning. Thank you again for such a memorable and enjoyable stay!

Fantastic Big 4 caravan park for the whole family.
So much to do for kids and adults alike.
Mini golf, playground, tennis, basketball, waterslides galore.
We had a 3 bedroom cabin which was lovely and clean and very very comfortable for 6 of us

We recently stayed at the BIG4 Airlie Beach and overall had a great experience.

The park itself is very family friendly with lots to do for kids of all ages. The animal farm was an absolute hit with our children they wanted to go back every day. The amenities were always clean and tidy, and the grounds were some of the cleanest we’ve seen at any park. Groundskeepers were constantly working and always greeted us with a smile, which was a nice touch. Caravan sites were large and easy to access, giving us plenty of room to set up comfortably.

A couple of downsides we noticed – there were quite a lot of underage kids roaming the park unsupervised, which seemed frustrating for the staff trying to manage safety. Also, the pool wasn’t heated, which was a bit disappointing considering we visited during winter.

That said, we’d definitely stay here again. It’s a great park, well looked after, and offers plenty for families to enjoy.
Great cabins and activities within the park, but expect to pay more than average price. Even powered sites were $$$. A great spot for families and fun none the less.

We stayed in a beautiful 3 bedroom whitehaven condo which was perfect for the 8 of us. The park had so much for the kids to do which made it more relaxing for us adults! We loved the waterpark, pool, animal park, jumping pillows, mini golf, tennis court, movie every night on the big screen, poolside massages & coffee van! Location was great - close to woolworths & take away facilities. The staff were super friendly & helpful... especially when recommending tours.
Will definately be back!
We were right next to the road with our studio villa. We found it no drama at all. With the planes or traffic. We would highly recommend.

I camped in the non powered section. Beautiful gardens, well maintained. Very good amenities, and a warm welcome from the reception. I didn't realise the airport was right behind us, but there was no noise after dark. Actually I enjoyed seeing the planes so close. Great price for a lovely park in a very expensive area.
Awesome staff extremely friendly and helpful 5 stars

Unfortunately, we couldn’t stay at this place even though we paid for it because it smelt so bad of pee and the loud frequent noise from planes and helicopters was very unpleasant. It was extremely disappointing.
No one even contacted us to inquire why we left either which probably means they already know how bad it is.

Wir haben vorzeitig abgebrochen! Waren mit zwei kleinen Kindern und im Wohnmobil unterwegs (2 Monate)  aber der Campingplatz war mit Abstand der schlechteste, der Lärm von den Flugzeugen und den Hubschrauber waren so laut, niemand konnte mehr schlafen, ab 06.30Uhr morgens flogen sie im Sinkflug über den Campingplatz es war unerträglich! Wir sind dann vorzeitig gegangen da unsere Kinder einfach nicht schlafen konnten, das Geld haben wir nicht wieder zurück bekommen auch kein Gutschein war möglich! Die Dame am Empfang war sehr unfreundlich außerdem standen wir ausversehen auf dem falschen Platz (sind in der Nacht angekommen) morgens Um 07.30 klopfte es an der Tür wir sollen bitte sofort wegfahren! Alles sehe unfreundlich würde ich definitiv nicht empfehlen

Lovey pet friendly park
Good size sites. We were backed onto the bush and had daily visits from the local wildlife.
Amenities clean and modern.
No ocean access however only a short drive to same.
Nice cafe right next door at the airstrip.
The planes didn't cause any issue with noise
Would definitely stay again

Wir haben im September diesen Jahres zwei Nächte auf diesem Campground verbracht, nachdem wir 2017 schon einmal dort waren.
Die Powered Sites sind zum Teil schattig, jedoch bieten die Plätze wenig Abstand zueinander. Die sanitären Anlagen waren ok, vertragen aber durchaus einen Modernisierung. Was man bei einem Aufenthalt in dieser Anlage wissen muss, ist die Tatsache, dass der Flugplatz für die Touristen-Flüge direkt daneben liegt. Das Starten und Landen kleiner Propellermaschinen verursacht doch ordentlich Lärm.

I have stayed at the resort for two nights. It was a total waste of money. The room was unclean and  very congested, no space to move around. The bathroom smelled disgusting and was not sanitary. I would never recommend this place to anyone.

Very friendly & professional staff that went out of their way to make sure our stay was perfect :-)
We stayed in a pet friendly cabin with our dog Freya who was also made to feel very welcome by the staff.
Definitely a family friendly park that is kept spotless.
Thank you to all the staff.
Steve & Jo & Freya x
P.S pic of Freya for Jess
Great location. Friendly staff. Pet friendly.
Great quiet location, and very pet friendly
Overall it ok but the amenities need work. See pics.

Nice clean quite parks ,
( park kitchen / amenities / pool/sand area / on-site chef in weekdays / reception ladies )
close to Shute harbour marina 5+mins .
Airport  2+mins
close to Airlie beach shopping centre 5+mins…
Cannonvale shopping centre 10+mins

we stayed eco deluxe lodge which newly build .. no problems at all during stay with park amenities ,other holidays makers ,
Only shortcoming as compare  to other big4/discovery Parks(  lack of kids jumping area/pillow .. big pool with water area activity)… 10/10

I was disappointed with the campsite under a fig tree that left bat excrement over all of our gear and the fact that we were made to feel most unwelcome to wash out boats there.

Not a good park for boaters to visit.
A bit bigger sites for side fold campers would be ideal
We stayed in a camper, everything is close to you on site. Fantastic coffee shop next door. Food truck on site beside cinema/band area. Very helpful & lovely people. Will absolutely be staying again

Unfortunately we were disappointed and would not book here again.
Upon check in the reception lady went through the park map with me and pointed out the "jumping pillow" only for us to discover there was in fact no jumping pillow just a pile of sand. We were given 1 toilet roll for 3 nights for 6 guests! When I asked the cleaner for a roll of toilet paper the following day, she looked frustrated and handed me one toilet roll! If you are wanting a sleep in past 6am, this is not the place to book. The planes behind the big4 park start at 6am and are quite loud from the cabins! Big bird issue right outside the cabin we were in, curlew birds & baby curlews (nests)were right behind our cabin, they carried on early hours of the morning 2am-4am.

We felt welcomed, valued and respected. Our little service dogs were welcomed also. The facilities are top class and we very much enjoyed all that was on offer. The coffee and food bar adjacent to the water slides area is staffed by very professional people and the menu is excellent for a van styled catering service. We plan to return here in the future.

Park is very well thought out, the powered sites were large and angled with the main roads so easy to reverse into. Pool and slides and awesome, really good facilities in great condition like basketball court and tennis court, movies. Only improvements that can be made is laundry to be card friendly and amenities to be cleaned more often.
We had a wonderful time.  Unfortunately it wasn't quite warm enough for us to utilise the pool and slides much but the whole place is really tidy and a terrific place to stay.
Fantastic holiday park! Kids had so much fun. So much to do with all the extra activities on the school holidays.

It’s an ok park . We were in a powered site , no amenities anywhere near us at all . Had small children , no way you could use a toilet at night far to far away . Whole park really had 2 toilets and 2 showers . Dismal for a park this size . Amenities ok , most parks have similar , everything costs a fortune . We are pensioners visiting grandies , an icecream was $7 rack . All the extras $$$.
Very disappointed in whole place .
Big NO to visiting again . My advice , keep going !

Excellent resort with lots of interesting things to do. Best is there is an ice cream van most days (although bad for my waistline!). Reception is overdone, shame there couldn’t have been as much spent on maintaining the toilet blocks, although the shower size is the best I have ever seen :) Would recommend heartily.

We hadn't booked but were lucky enough to get a last minute powered site. Very neat and clean park. Amenities spotless. This is a perfect park for families. Activities also happening daily for the children. Loved our stay. A big mention to Anita for booking our tour out to the reef. A very memorable day.

We are powered site tent campers.
This caravan park is resort standard. It's the best we've ever stayed at and wouldn't stay anywhere else when in Airlie Beach.
Love this place. Family friendly great spot to keep the kids entertained. We will be back weather they want us or not lol

Such a great park, lots of fun
for everyone.
Amazing get away and the resort upgraded us for free which was an amazing surprise. Will definitely be back in the warmer months 😍
Incredible caravan park. The most tropical park we’ve been to and perfect for kids. Would highly recommend.

As my wife previously mentioned about keeping up with the times regarding SMOKING!! We had to put up with chain smokers next to us & it stunk!
If I was owner of this park or the Big4 or other caravan park franchises, it is now time to ban smoking & vaping anywhere on the properties! I can guarantee 99% of the smokers will leave to smoke elsewhere outside of the property as they have to nearly every where they are! The sites are too close to each other to think the smoke will not upset the neighbours!!
PLEASE
NO MORE SMOKING AT CARAVAN PARKS!!
Then I would give you 5 stars!
Get with the times & you will keep us all happy!

A great park for families. Caravan sites are great. However the smoking policy for this park seriously needs reviewing. A caravan can park on the site right next to you (non smokers) and the couple then continually smoke all day. Why is this allowed ? Why is the question not asked before check in if you are a smoker ? If so there should be a designated area for the smokers. The government also needs to review caravan park smoking policies - currently no one is allowed to smoke in public places or near children, yet they can park a caravan right next to your windows where you sleep and cook and continually smoke freely ? Absolutely changed our opinion of Big 4 who need to get with the times ! Smoking laws in Australia changed many years ago !
We had a caravan not a cabin. This park is definitely a resort. The facilities are fantastic especially the pool area. Such amazing deals to be had as a Big4 member

Don’t come to this caravan park if you’re travelling with a few families. Kids were not allowed to play around in the park & we were threatened if we didn’t keep them quiet we would be kicked out!

It’s school holidays mate! I think the manager needs to chill out or get a different job

Booked a Pacific site 2 weeks prior to arrival. Upon arrival that site was unavailable,tried to put us on a very small site but then we had to accept a slabbed site. We were towing a 7 mtr boat and had a tent and gazebo. I explained all this when booking.Never,never again.
Also the price to pay for a early morning alarm clock( 100 yards from airport )is ridiculous. First time I have ever complained about a caravan park.
We had a very relaxing time and only a short drive from Airlie Beach. They had a pool and also a kiosk. Highly recommend them for your stay
Booked for 4 nights stayed for 11. Would have stayed longer if we could have, but a new destination calls. Thanks team. You were all awesome. We will be back. But next time we will stay longer.
Very nice camp site ,spoiled by the constant noise of airplanes taking off

Crammed in on site in an emergency it is questionable if you could vacate the site.Facilities removed from site
For kids bouncy pillow out door moves and on-site food wagon not used
Highly recomend this park, staff were lovely & helpful, amenities were clean, location was great, enjoyed the movie & pizza night organized by the park. Would love to return next year!

El camping esta muy bien. Tiene una linda pileta. Camp kitchen abierta con todo lo necesario. Pileta grande. Y hay cine y food truck bastante seguido. La única desventaja si deseas descansar el aeropuerto comienza a operar a las 7 a.m y es muy ruidoso. Lo bueno si deseas hacer el tour estás muy cerca. al
Had my own caravan, have been here 3 times now and loved it every time. Recent wet weather had affected the grounds but still one of my favourite parks to visit.

Although we didn't stay in a room, our site was awesome. Set among the trees. Beautiful park. Amenities clean and tidy.
Staff friendly and pet friendly.
I would go back in a heartbeat.

Little disappointed with booking system, kept getting huge caravans in small sites and small caravans in huge sites, we were asked to pack up every thing and move over about 1 foot to the left, I refused as we were clearly in the allocated site. I then found out they were trying to put a huge caravan with a slide out in the site next to us in the small site next to us.
Also not happy with the booking system here, we had to book and pay in advance because it was quite busy however we also has to full pay for our 14 day stay, $52 per night, by the time we arrived 6 weeks later it was $35 per night and$28 if staying for 2 nights or more I know the price fluctuates but that was ridiculous and could not get a refund on the difference.
I had a great grass spot for my van and it was so beautiful. The staff are amazing, friendly and very accommodating. I will come back and friends have said they will come there next year. 😊 ❤️

Fantastic caravan park, huge sites, management puts on a music and movie with a pizza truck. Amenities are in good condition. The park is maintained perfectly, with plenty of tropical vegetation (attached photo below from my site). Definitely will come back. Only draw back are the planes taking off in the morning (airfield is behind the park), but then I'm an early riser, so it wasn't an issue.
The plane noise is fine but did the yard person really need to us a 2stroke blower vac at 8am every morning and close to your site!
We had just one night here. Pool area was fun but you could not hear your own voice there was so much maintenance going on. Shame, as that waterpark was what we came for. No notifications upfront.

Fabulous park with great facilities
Amazing value
We have rebooked for 2026
We stayed in a swag. The place is great, amenities are clean and ample. Staff were lovely.

Great place for kids, they loves the slides. Staff were friendly and overall a good time.  Facilities are getting a bit run down. Also we were on site 14, backed onto a polluted creek with I assume waste from caravans going to it as it was foamy. Also breeding ground for midges. Toward the centre of park would be better perhaps.

Aussie Travellers 🇦🇺

The Big4 Adventure Whitsunday Park really is a ‘one stop’ holiday destination

Boasting many on-site facilities and planned activities that help to ensure everyone enjoys their stay

There’s a local bus stop right out front and all of the tour operators and local courtesy buses happily pick-up and drop-off at the front gate

We found the staff to be happy, helpful and hardworking - maintaining the park to an exceptional standard

However, we found the lack of provision for grey water collection, from some sites, to be an issue with shower, kitchen and laundry water running to grade

On the positive, the local Woolworths and Big W shopping centre is within walking distance as are McDinalds, KFC and Fishi outlets

The park WiFi is very good and we also had good mobile service 👍

We loved out stay at this fantastic park and look forward to visiting again

Stayed at the BIG4 Whitsundays and had a great time!
The water park was a hit, and the pool was a really good size, perfect for cooling off.
Plenty to do with mini golf, a tennis court, and more to keep everyone entertained.

We had a powered site which was super convenient.

Only downside was the road noise from the nearby road, but everything else made up for it.
Staff were friendly, helpful, and the whole place is ideal for families with young kids.
Would definitely stay again especially if had a big group!

Stayed on a powered site for 2 weeks fantastic park

They have a mixed weekly activity list for both kids and  adults with  live music a couple of nights a week, free aqua areobics & bingo different food vans, icecream vans at reasonble prices. Kids slides/bucket and much more.

The only downfall is the sandflies morning and afternoon, l think the park needs to get all sites sprayed a couple of times a year. We were eaten alive!

Great place for families.

We stayed at BIG4 Whitsunday Adventure Resort in mid to late May and had an absolutely fantastic time. This place is a paradise for families!||The standout feature for us was the 13 waterslides in the splash park – yes, 13! Our kids couldn’t get enough. There were heaps of scheduled activities every single day, sometimes even twice a day, from outdoor games to crafts and movie nights. It kept them busy, happy, and completely worn out – they slept like rocks every night!||The café next to the pool was such a handy bonus – great for grabbing a coffee or a snack while the kids played. All the facilities were clean, modern, and well maintained, and the overall vibe was super family-friendly and relaxed.||For what you get, the prices were very reasonable, especially given the amount of entertainment and activities included.||Highly recommend for families looking for a fun-filled holiday with plenty to keep the kids moving and memories to be made. We’ll definitely be back!

We recently stayed in a 3 bedroom condo for 6 days and loved every minute, the condo was so luxurious, comfy, spacious and had absolutely everything we needed.
We were with our 8 year granddaughter who loved going to the animal park and she really enjoyed using the sensory room.
It was so hard to get her off the water slides and the tipping bucket.  We all loved the pool too and she even had her face painted one afternoon.
A great big thankyou to the face painter who tirelessly painted the huge queue of children, even going way past her time to finish.
Having the ice-cream van was a big hit with us all and we enjoyed a couple of bbq's on our deck.
Thank you for the milk and packet of TimTams on our arrival. We hired a 2 seated go-cart which proved to be quite difficult for even the adults to pedal- perhaps could do with some updating. We noticed a couple of the carts were newer.
Was disappointed that the giant jumping pillows were out of use at the time we were there. The whole family played mini golf which was great.
We felt very safe with the security code on the front gate and found all the staff very helpful and friendly.

Above and beyond expectation!
Thank you so much to Sandy and her team, we had a spectacular stay. It is so rare to find a place like this where every single person working there is so kind and helpful great recommendations were provided to us and they go above and beyond to meet expectations.

The facilities are absolutely amazing you do not need to leave! plenty of waterslides for the kids, the pool with also 2 slides. We enjoyed the kids club, visit from the wildlife animals and also the animal farm.

There was different food vans at night, ice cream truck visit, face painting and even an outdoor cinema.

Before we checked out we also squeezed in mini golf, definitely lots to do and make great memories with the kids.

Great little cafe next to the pool for drinks and food and also for your morning coffee.

Location of the park is also great, walking distance to woolworths and all other shops and only a short drive to Airlie Beach restaurants.

Our 4 and 6 year old had the best time and did not want to leave they made so many friends.

We will definitely be back! Thank you so much for having such great staff that love doing what they do and making our stay wonderful.

Amazing place for Adults and the kids, great facilities with a large pool and multiple slides, We stayed in a cabin with our 1 year old plenty of room for her to scoot around.

The few things that were disappointing was I feel some parents just let their children roam free on their bikes and scooters with no helmets out of their site as young as 3. These little kids come flying around corners not looking when cars are coming. Accident waiting to happen

This is not aimed at the resort more so the irresponsible parents.
Parents need to watch their children on the slides we seen kids jumping over the top of other kids going down straight after someone else and smashing into other little ones down the bottom and taking them out. There’s multiple signs around the area stating can you see your child, hear them, within arms reach ? I feel parents just think it’s a good place to let them run wild with no patience and respect for others while drinking alcohol out of there Yeti cups not making sure their child is being respectful and behaving. We saw multiple people drinking alcohol around the pool area and sneaking it in and hiding it like little kids. DO BETTER PARENTS there’s rules for a reason.

The last thing was I put clothes in the dryer tonight and some low life took our clothes out and put their own clothes in to dry on my coins I come back to wet clothes and 2 pieces of their hot clothes mixed amongst mine. Disgusting behaviour!

Not sure how that can be addressed because I know a text message reminder does not work either, numerous kids didn’t have an arm band on under the age. Despite the reminder sent out people just don’t care or follow rules.

Apart from the above we had a lovely holiday in the Whitsundays 😊

This park ticks ALL the boxes! Great family friendly holiday park! Everything you need and more. We stayed in a studio cabin and it was comfortable for 2x adults and 3x kids. There was a double bed, a bunk bed and a trundle bed to pull out as well. The kids loved the water park, animal park, putt putt golf and the playground.  They offer food carts at night, but there are multiple BBQ areas to cook your own family dinner, which we used! Would recommend to any family traveling to the whitsundays!

Took my 6yr old daughter for few days getaway and couldn't be happier. From the easy booking and price matching, friendly efficient on-site service at reception, lush tropical looking surrounds of the property, on-site facilities such as visiting food vans and residential services like massage and Cafe van and activities to the clean cabins and abundance of things to do on site. The jewel in the crown for Lychi my daughter was the waterpark,  about 10 waterslides over two pools as well as activities like mini golf, tennis, badminton and an animal park.
Highly recommend the park and couldn't fault a thing. Its a no fuss, fun experience as evidenced by the strong patronage, yet the massive grounds give a sense of pristine tropical solitude. Will be my GOTO place in Airlie Beach from now on.

If you're after an awesome laze-about holiday destination that will keep the kids entertained, then this is it! Woolworths just down the road, McDonalds basically next door, endless water fun with 12 water slides and an enormous pool... there's no real need to leave! Just watch the midges, though. 3 weeks later, and we're still scratching 😬
Stayed for a week, should of checked the reviews! Ffs, planes and helicopters landing in the airport next to us from 650 am. Felt like the van was the landing sight. Never again!
We stayed on a very sloppy grass site quite hard to drive onto and skidding on grass the movie was a good idea but way way too loud but lucky was over by the time we went to bed
Lovely park Very clean Only criticism need another washing machine in the laundry

We stayed 4 nights and we had a very good stay. It is right next to the airport where many flying tours go out for day trips and they are really loud, but it didn't bother us, and they were not noisy at night. The camping was tidy and clean. The camp kitchen had everything you need. We would recommend it and stay there again.

Very disappointed that when we had to depart two days early there was no offer of refund or credit against a future stay.

After staying at this venue before we are certainly considering alternative options for the next time we are in Airlie
Eaten alive by sand flies !!

We stayed on a powered site. It was absolutely beautiful,  nestled in amongst the palms. Like a little Oasis. Loved this place, Amenities were super clean and well maintained.  Park is clean and a pleasure to stay at

This place is way out of town but the local hotel has a courtesy bus to pick you up if you become a member (which is free). The camp kitchen is old and dirty. Noise from the airport next door starts at 6am. The park is tidy and the amenities fairly clean but dated.
We were unfortunate to have some European neighbours nearby that thought it was appropriate to party until 4am. No staff were onsite to complain to.

Friends booked and paid for 3 days accommodation but husband  has taken ill a few days  before booked date and was under medical care and were unable to make the arranged booking. They informed the park about their situation and tried to get money back or credit but were informed no to both. This is an elderly couple that would have loved to have a credit to be able to visit the park at a later date when the husband recovers. It was peak time so the park has kept the couples money then rented the accommodation out again. Double dipping at it's best, well done park management.

Stayed 3 nights on a slab. Some of the sites were lovely with beautiful plants and plenty of grass behind them. Ours was very ordinary for $50 a night. Otherwise a nice small site with old, but clean amenities. Airport noise didn't bother us. Able to walk dog through to airport area, which had more grassy spots.

Lovely place away from the Airlie main crowd. Super clean facilities, peaceful quiet pool. Very peaceful and relaxing when you’re on holiday. The only downside the noise from the airport next door but obviously not the campsite’s issue. Wish there are 2 sinks instead of 1 in the camp kitchen, usually there is a wait to use it around meal time

Was ok, but not great, sites were very small (one site divided into two). And noise from light aircraft coming & going regularly throughout the day was annoying. Very basic facilities. Pool was decent, but not much else for kids. Tiny playground, no jumping pillow or anything. Camp kitchen was very basic. Amenities were clean & tidy, but out-dated. And no fires! Would not return.
Great little park 🏞️ very friendly staff

Lovely caravan park with lots of trees and shade. Only a five minute drive into Airlie Beach. Sites were good so long as you were on a flat one. Ideal spot is on the riverbank but they were booked out. Was a bit tight getting in and out of site opposite the toilet block but once we were in we were happy. Laundry facilities $4 for washing $4 for dryer. Amenities should be cleaned more than once a day as the park was full and bench in showers should go the full length. Beautiful pool area and well kept grounds . Staff were very helpful to assist us in getting our van in. . There’s a great cafe through the back of the park that serves brekkie and lunch.

Anlage in einem Park mit traumhaftem Baum Estland. Sanitäranlagen sauber. Liegt außerhalb des Ortes, Fahrmöglichkeit ist notwendig. Liegt gleich neben einem Flugplatz, einen Wecker brauchen Sie nicht. Aber erträglich. Am Flugplatz ein Café mit herrlichem Frühstücksangebot. Empfehlenswert.

The worst location to put a caravan park.. next door to an air port ..
The park it’s self has some great sites… BUT some should be shut down and not used .. 81a for example ..
The staff were very friendly and helpful..
The park is located a long way from any attractions other than the air port ..
The Handar Cafe was the only decent attraction on site .. Good coffee and food ..
We will never return to this park ..

BIG4 Whitsundays Resort is by far the best BIG4 or hotel we’ve ever stayed at. We came up as a family to celebrate a birthday and anniversary, and it couldn’t have been more perfect. The cabin was spotless, and the whole resort was impeccably maintained.

The staff were warm, welcoming, and incredibly helpful—especially the lovely lady at reception in the yellow shirt with her hair pulled back.

A big thanks to Ash, who helped us check in, shared some fantastic local tips and even gave us a hand with our luggage to the cabin—she really made everything smooth and stress-free.

And of course, a special shoutout to Imogen! Her warm, engaging voice and friendly energy made us feel right at home. She added a lovely personal touch to our stay that we truly appreciated. We slept so well during our night there!

The kids had an absolute ball on the water slides and go-karts, and we loved the convenience of the on-site food cart. One night there was even a visiting Thai food cart, which was a great surprise and super tasty!

We couldn’t have asked for a better place to relax and celebrate as a family. Highly recommend to anyone looking for fun, comfort, and top-notch hospitality.
It's better not to call the reception around 5pm,  reception girl just handed up the phone, couldn't remember her name, terrible service.
What a great place.  We were just a couple but I can see families are well catered for with lots of things to do.

Es soll ein Premium BIG4 sein. Die Nacht kostet 104 AUD für eine „powered Site“ für unserem Wohnmobil. Leider hat es nicht wie anderen BIG4 Resorts einen Abwasseranschluss am Platz. Die Steinplatte neben dem Stellplatz war verdreckt. Der große Waterpark ist wirklich schön aber überall ist der Boden klebrig, auch am großen Pool. Eine Reinigung wird dringend benötigt. Der Kidsclub ist so gut wie immer geschlossen.

Der Ressort hat wirklich ein Plageproblem. Im Vergleich zu anderen Campingplätzen (bisher waren wir an 10 unterschiedlichen im Norden Australiens) gibt es hier extrem viele Mücken und Sandfliegen.

Nachricht ans Management: Bitte schaut ech de big4 in Cairns an! Keine Probleme mit Sandfliegen und bessere Service und Hygiene.

We love this resort at the beginning. Unfortunately something happened when we check out. I double confirmed before book the resort as well as during the stay that we can still use the pool after check out and they answered yes of coz. However the receptionist kick us out when my husband checked out . Me and my son were playing at the pool. It’s very disappointing especially with a toddler , I won’t come back here again . I will not book here ever again .
Certainly lived up to expectations. Beautifully maintained grounds, friendly staff, abundance of activities for kids throughout the day...all in a tropical paradise!

Amazing place to stay with the family!
Huge shout out to Anita at reception for booking us on our tours, especially the outer reef tour.
Highly recommend, friendly staff and awesome set up!
We will be back
We always love this place, that's why we come back every year!
Ridiculously expensive for sites. Amenities block needs some attention, school groups crowd out facilities.

Poisionsly expensive over $150 a night for a sm plot, the elevated gardens caused flooding,  Concidering we were miles from a toilet, the tap had non standard USA connection. Had to ferry water.
Senior staff need to be educated on how to handle issues. I was treated condesendingly but still it was very busy.
On a positive Lots to do for kids,
Disco was terrific,  activities were brilliant. Should be $80 a night not $175 for a powered site for a family of 6.
Friendly staff, well maintained, good location

We’ve been loyal Big4 members for years and usually love our stays, but this time was disappointing. Staff were noticeably less friendly, and we felt unwelcome after check-out when we were questioned about why we were still on the facility even though we were just sitting by the pool.

Kids’ activities were fully booked despite the resort knows the expected attendees in advance and I paid an extra $120 for two additional kids—yet they couldn't participate in any activities.
Promotional material clearly stated kids stay free during holidays, but I was still charged extra 2 kids on the day .When I asked to cancel and rebook to get the correct rate, that was refused.

The total cost for two nights was $1092, the highest I’ve ever paid here, and the experience didn’t reflect the price or our previous positive visits. It felt very profit-driven, and sadly, I don’t think I’ll return.

We stayed with our 2 young boys for the week and they absolutely loved it! The staff were incredible and there were plenty of activities to keep everyone entertained.

All the facilities were clean and looked after.

The rooms were a little outdated with the bathroom desperately needing an update to add some bench space and for the shower to drain adequately and not into the actual bathroom.

We will absolutely be back and would recommend to anyone looking for somewhere to stay in Airlie Beach!
Can't beat this place!!! Kids loved it, parents love it!
Awesome resort. We stay every year and love it. I wish Airlie beach had more to do when raining like indoor arcade. But adventure whitsunday big 4 is amazing

I can honestly say big4 adventure Whitsunday is the most friendly family park I've ever been to. I can not scream their praises enough. This park has EVERYTHING! It is so well thought out and the service from staff is above and beyond. The activies, the water park, pool, animal park, sensory room and entertainment options were endless. My children are still too young to really be into snorkelling and we spent 5 days in Airlie and honestly we could have never left the park as there was so much to do. The accommodation itself was clean and spacious and the furnishings modern, working and everything you could require for cooking was supplied. If you have children there is so much for them to do. I can't wait to come back and visit here again it was definitely the highlight of our North qld trip.
Grote camping met alle mogelijke voorzieningen. Alles prima in orde. Beetje teveel Center Parcs voor ons.
The facilities were clean and well appointed. This was a lovely place to stay with good sized sites. Thank you

Would highly recommend this caravan park. The facilities are awesome and plenty of great areas to chill out. The camp kitchen and the toilets are cleaned daily. Nice sized camping sites. We stayed for a month and the staff were amazing. The ladies in the front office are very friendly and accomodating. Will definitely be staying again

My husband and I stayed at the big 4 tropical with my grand kids just recently 8,12,14 as we arrived were told that under new management a lot of the usual activities ie jumping pillow, water slides had been removed which was very disappointed the park suited younger family, i would appreciated being told regarding the kids ages we vacated the park early because of this and will not be staying again.
We were promised adjacent sites when we booked but not delivered when we got there. Reception claimed to know nothing about it and not prepared to help. Claimed park was full but it was not.
We have a really nice stay. Our room was very comfortable, clean and with all the amenities needed for our stayed. Very close proximity to Airlie Beach and a very nice cafe to eat close to the place.

If you like peace and quite don’t stay here
Airport right behind it very noisy

Great stay on a grassy powered site. Clean facilities and well maintained campground. Ideal location for a stopover close to Shute Harbour. Lovely staff member, Kelly, at reception was very helpful to us.
We stayed here for 6 nights at a powered site would highly recommend this if lace. Staff are very friendly & helpful.
Caravan sites are set in amongst trees !! It's beautiful 😊

It was a great stay in the middle of the forest ! We were with a campervan and really appreciated the site. You have your own private parking separate from others by plants. And not so far from the center. I recommend

Room was definitely not clean, no vanity plug. Showe sprays shelf not into cubicle.
Dehydrated cockroach, drawers full of roach dropping. Another one came in for a visit.
Understand its the tropics, linen poor quality.
We had a great time here, big park, very friendly staff, great facilities,, the pool are is amazing.

Fantastic resort! Absolutely loved it and all 4 kids, from a 1 year old to an 11 year old, had so much fun!
We went in March, it was rainy and cloudy, but it didn't stop the fun. It's so humid, that the rain was welcomed and the clouds just meant no harsh sun.
We stayed in a cabin, which was lovely, clean, well equipped and had great aircon.
The staff are very helpful and happy to help.

There's so much to do there, and the waterpark and pool so much fun, that we stayed for 4 days and never left the resort.
10/10 would recommend!

My daughter absolutely loved the water park, she couldn't get enough of it (she's 1.5 years)!

The room scored a 3 because there was mould on the roof in the bathroom and the shower head needs replacing. The bed was very comfortable though!
Great family holiday for all ages!

As someone who has stayed at multiple big4 this has been by far our favourite yet .
We travelled from the Gold Coast to Airlie specifically for this resort & it didn’t disappoint.

Firstly the TEAM . Specifically working from (9/3/25 - 12/3/25)
We had under booked on people in our cabin (unaware price goes by person at this resort so be mindful when booking) which was fixed promptly by a wonderful gentleman without any problems (didn’t get his name unfortunately)

Went to reception multiple times for hires & ice creams etc & was greeted warmly every single time with a smile.

Jacqui at the Kids Club & Animal Farm.
My 2 kids would not stop talking about her, they absolutely loved her & her positive energy.

Yes , the resort it’s self is immaculate , clean & a huge park full of fun especially for the kids , but the team here was really what made our stay pleasurable & can’t thank them enough for being super accommodating.

We can’t wait to come back in the future 🙂

Outstanding place for kids we have been travelling for 9 hours to get to this place and it was worth every second we are travelling with our little boy and he has thoroughly enjoyed himself the place we stayed in was nice and clean were really nice and friendly very welcoming and helpful. If you need them we asked for a late checkout which they complementary tended to for us.|Unfortunately, we only booked two nights and could’ve done a lot more as this place is outstanding highly recommend five stars⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️|Really friendly night keeper unfortunately didn’t get his name and Sandy who works in reception a really friendly woman outstanding staff
So great - a must-visit for family holidays. We'll be back for sure!

It is a very nice place to stay with family, we spend there 3 nights in RV, everything was great, pool is big, ther’re grill places, fun park, loundry services, big plus. Reception work till 5pm, in Australia is Normal but for people from Europe it wasnt, and minus for that from us
Great place to stay for a family with kids. The resort had plenty of options to do while you are here.

What a brilliant place to stay, our kids absolutely loved it. Farm animals,  mini golf, movie nights and the water park!
We will certainly be back!!
Staff are brilliant also, so bubbly and friendly, would give this place a 10/10 if I could!

We hit some very hot and humid weather, but the rooms were an awesome escape during the heat of the day, and the water park kept the kids busy in the morning and evening till fairly late.
Awesome family place.

Un accueil chaleureux et une équipe au top !

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour au camping d’Airlie Beach, et nous tenions à remercier toute l’équipe pour son incroyable accueil. Mention spéciale à Anita, qui est à 200% avec les clients ! Toujours souriante, bienveillante et prête à aider, elle a rendu notre séjour encore plus agréable.

L’équipe dans son ensemble est vraiment super, toujours disponible et attentionnée. C’est rare de trouver un service aussi chaleureux et authentique ! Nous repartons avec de très bons souvenirs et nous recommandons vivement cet endroit à tous ceux qui passent par Airlie Beach.

Merci encore et à bientôt, on l’espère !

awesome experience for the family, everything we hoped for and more.
If you have kids, they will be well entertained. Waterplay area is great, tidy rooms and close to shops.  We stayed in the room but the whole facility looked so tidy and neat.
The staff were wonderful and very helpful when the elder kiddo bumped her head and collected a cut on the eye.
All in all, we enjoyed our visit to the area and the accommodation played a big part in it.

Was such a great weekend away we didn’t want to leave, the staff are so accommodating and happy to help in any way possible, the park is beautiful and clean , would be good if the camp kitchen had some extra utensils and scouters to clean the bbqs

Amazing place for kids and adults
Highly recommend
Sandy at reception was very helpful

We would love to give a huge shout out to all the wonderful staff at the resort! Names we remember are Sandy, Ash and Danielle who were absolutely exceptional in the care they took with us during our stay  at the resort. Sadly the weather had played a big roll in us having to cut our holiday short and Sandy was instrumental in ensuring our safety from the wet conditions when we really needed to be be safe and dry when our camps were setup near the rising creek. We were afforded a very generous upgrade from our camp digs to a cabin that ensured that we could enjoy the remainder of our stay in the resort. Were it not for this generosity we would have been in the wet conditions and not been able to enjoy our holiday. The recommendations made by the team for us to enjoy our stay were fantastic. We got to see Georges Diner and went to The Deck in Airlie which were fabulous!!!  We look forward to booking with the resort again in the future and cannot wait to see you all again!
The entire team is fantastic and are a credit to the resort.
Thank you once again for taking such wonderful care of us and your generosity and care for all your visitors is a testament to your kindness and heartfelt humanity, keep up the good work.
Georgia who does the bookings is AMAZING. Could not have been more helpful or nice.

We had a lovely stay as a group. Great amenities at the park and lots for kids to do. The waterpark in particular, was a highlight for them. Sadly, it rained 2 days out of the 4 we stayed, so more rainy day options for kids would have been good. We stayed in a premium 2BR cottage which looked quite new. Fresh linen and towels, great spacious living area and kitchen, and bonus of washing machine/dryer. We really enjoyed the stay here. A huge downfall for us was my husband and daughter getting stuck in the bedroom. My daughter accidentally locked the door while they were inside and we had to call out the resorts locksmith/maintenance person. It took them half an hour or so to get out by breaking the door handle. We actually had to get my 4 year old daughter out from the window as she was quite distressed by this stage (which was very hard to open by the way, due to the security screens on them). We raised this as a fire hazard in case people needed to escape in a fire. We did get feedback response today with an apology about the incident and that the room locks have now been changed in these type of cabins which is good to know. I would have expected some kind of compensation from such a big resort for our distressing time, however, we weren't offered anything besides the apology which is a shame. It ruined our mood for the last day and our daughter was quite shaken up.
Despite this unfortunate incident, I have still recommended the resort to many friends and family.

What an excellent place to stay for families! The facilities are amazing, massive waterpark and pool area which we used everyday. The grounds are well cared for, everything is clean. Anita is a customer service superstar. She booked several day trips for us as well as gave excellent recommendations for places to visit and places to eat. This really made our stay relaxing and enjoyable. One of the most relaxing holidays I’ve had as a parent. Will definitely return.
We love this place for our family getaways! Endless waterslides and clean comfortable rooms! This is our 4th year back now and have not yet disappointed.

We have had a fantastic stay. Even though it rained for 2.5 days.The office staff were amazing, helpful and very accommodating. Anita was friendly and fabulous at booking a tour for us as ours had been cancelled due to the weather but she did it and got us on to the Jetboating that made our stay. Park is fantastic, well maintainedand very organised activities to keep the kiddos entertained. Thanks again for everything and we will see you again soon 👍

It's such a great holiday place for kids . There is so much to do, so close to everything. So clean , so well maintained.
Anita was amazing. Nothing was too much trouble for her.
Best holiday park I've ever stayed at.
We will definitely be returning.
So beautiful.
Overall it was a good experience but one of the types of birds, are very loud overnight which kept us up a lot

Familie mit 2 Kids (4 Jahre und 11 Monate) der Camper Platz war gut mit allem was man braucht. Sanitäranlagen wurden immer gereinigt und in gutem Zustand. Schwimmbad sehr gut für Kids am Morgen kann man auch mal im Ansatz Bahnen schwimmen. Mit dem Bus kann man in die Stadt fahren und zurück. BBQ immer sauber.
Awesome pool, Clean and comfy rooms and nice facilities 😎

We recently hire two seperate 2 bedroom cabins across the new year period 2024.One for us and the second for three grown boys. This is my first stay in a park like this and this park definitely has a homely feel. From the tim tams in the fridge as a welcome gift to the daily text messages updating you on park activities', food vans and food options available to the cleanliness and coordination of park. I would highly recommend to anyone. We could whip in and out of town or stay in the park relax and entertain ourselves with the park activities.
Great park managed by great staff x
This place is THE BEST! The cabins are new and well appointed and the water park has 13 water slides. Across the road from the pub too.

The best caravan park we’ve been to! Amazing activities for the kids and tons of waterslides. Park is located close to the shops and the Lagoon. Amenities are nice and clean and the phone service is amazing! The only complaint we have is about the electric scooters. We were told we couldn’t ride them, but we saw so many other people on theirs not getting chipped. Apart from that, we always have a great time here. Great pool too!

We have had a fantastic stay. The office staff have been lovely , helpful and very accommodating,  nothing is too much. Anita was friendly and fabulous at booking our tours. Manager Sandy was very helpful. Park is fantastic, well maintained. Very organised activities.
This is one of the Best Big 4 i ever been to

Awesome holiday so friendly and lots of activities for all ages  food van on site amazing food and the best coffees ever didn’t really have to leave resort because everything is there the staff are the best so friendly and helpful and everything was always with a big smile will definitely be back again  thank you big 4 airlee beach for making my stay the best ever

We stayed recently for 3 nights.
Awesome resort for kids and families.
Our cabin was massive, new and luxurious.  Very clean with new furnishings and appliances.
Only thing I would have wanted was a BBQ on our deck as we had a few BBQ 's and had to walk to the communal BBQ.  But the other bigger cabins had BBQS  in their desks.
A bit pricey in the peak season.
Our shower took forever to get hot and then it wouldn't stay hot, luckily it's the tropics and you don't need a hot shower.
But we loved it.
My family had the greatest time here. You don't need to leave the park if you bring enough food supplies. Kids never got bored, which is awesome for the parents

The location is okay parking is hard and very far away from the waterpark. It took us forever to check in. We did not get a room. We just parked and went to the waterpark. Waterpark was super fun but the tiles need to upgrade. I saw kids slipping on the tiles and won’t even hurt their head. As for the mermaid. I saw her getting wheeled away and she couldn’t even answer all the kids questions because there was this group of little young kids following her around and nearly drowning themselves cause she went in the deep end. As for injury one of the people I know got a bloody nose it took them 10 minutes to come down and give them a superduper to suck on. Then it took them 30 minutes to come back and check on them. And wouldn’t let her go in the water until she felt better that feels overprotective.

!!PHENOMENAL!!
My little family of 4 have been to many Big4’s & many Ingenia’s (Cairns, Townsville, Airlie, Brisbane)  ect… Adventure Whitsundays is just that, an Adventure of EPIC proportion!!
From a fully packed schedule for the kids & parents (braiding, movies, food trucks, Santa’s workshop, animal farm, face painting, cooking, arts & crafts ect ect) to the incredible experiences on your doorstep in Airlie - this is the place to be!
More waterslide than you can poke a stick at, awesome pools, kiddie pool, playground, jumping pillows, mini golf, go karts… it’s all here!
There is even a spa for those parents lucky enough to relax ☺️
We stayed in a caravan site & our only complaint is that it isn’t level (nature site) but we honestly haven’t noticed much (the rain was slightly frustrating but it doesn’t matter). The staff are incredible & deal with any issue you have immediately (washing machine ate $3 but I was given a free wash & my money back!)
It’s stunning being surrounded by the tropical landscape! The wildlife is beautiful to listen to. Facilities are fantastic, very clean & practically everything has been provided for you (dishwashing liquid, washing detergent, cooking utensils ect).
We adore this park & it has become our favourite in the short 4 days we’ve been here. Couldn’t recommend highly enough!! Will be back a thousand time over. Thank you BIG4!

Great place for kids, park overall is getting tired, dirt power sites etc with dead grass, although lots of nice new cabins with nice landscaping in certain areas, we stayed in a two bedroom cabin which was great, comfortable beds and plenty of space, we enjoyed it but back to Hamilton Island for us, different league for quality and value.

We honestly really enjoyed staying here. It's made me want to come back again and again. I'm definitely going back there no questions asked. The staff were very nice and made us feel welcome, the food was divine, our cabin was perfect for our family size and we enjoyed the water park so much we didn't want to go home😅
Awesome location

Splash park, mini golf, tennis court and pool were great. We had our van at an ensuite site. The shower head/pressure combination rendered the shower unusable, very weak and dispersed flow. Unfortunately the dump point is over a metre off the ground, not user friendly at all for emptying a cassette. The staff friendly and helpful. If it wasn't for the dump point and shower water pressure would not hesitate to recommend/stay again.
Es war fantastisch, vor allem für die Kinder!

Had a lovely week with family. Our little granddaughter loved the pool, slides, swing and bouncing pillow. She also loved the animals. She was too little to participate in the kids activities, so we will have to return when she is older.

What a great place for families! We had planned to go to Fiji this year (we went last year) but weren't able to, so headed to Airlie Beach instead and stayed at the Big4. We had heard it was great, and it did not disappoint. Don't waste your money going overseas! Other than an all-inclusive meal package which we would have had in Fiji (plus the added kgs that go along with it!) this place was so much better than anywhere we could have stayed in Fiji.
We had a deluxe studio cabin which was clean and had everything we needed. The bed was super comfy. Pillows weren't great, but if you are fussy take your own. My sister had a spa cottage and it was great too. Nanna and Grandad had a powered site with their van and they were located directly opposite the playground so that was perfect!
The kids (2, 3 & 4 years old) absolutely loved the jumping pillows and the playground. The pool is absolutely brilliant! The dedicated toddler play pool with small slides is fantastic, and deep enough for adults to sit in the water while supervising. There was also a lovely shallow section of the big pool that the kids and adults loved. Lots of shade around the pool and plenty of places to relax. There are clear signs about separating under 5s from the bigger kids, but parents weren't too great at monitoring that and there were often big kids on the under 5s stuff.
There is a coffee van which has lovely food too - toasted cheese and ham etc. open each day from 7am to 2pm. What a lifesaver, being able to get a decent coffee!
The shop at reception had plenty of supplies too, everything you could need. You could stay at this resort and not leave for anything. There were meal options most nights if you wanted to buy on site, or you could get pizza delivered and maccas I think.
KFC/Maccas are right next door. The Reef Gateway Hotel over the road also does amazing pub food and there is another awesome airconditioned playground there for kids too.
We arrived on a Sunday and it was fully booked, but didn't feel too busy. Plenty of room for everyone.
Movie nights were a hit!
Immaculate grounds, and all the workers getting around were very friendly. No rubbish anywhere.
Icecream van comes daily and travels throughout the resort.
The animal park was slightly disappointing for us country folks as it was mostly ducks, chooks and one sheep. We had been hoping for more variety, but it was still ok, and was free.
Lots of activities for kids.
Mini golf area is lovely although the water seemed a little stagnant so I imagine the mozzies like it in there. We didn't get attacked at all the entire week we were there though.
Lots to hire from the shop, you won't be bored.
You can get a bus into Airlie Beach - the lagoon there was lovely to swim in.

Suggestions from me for improvement: wagons available to hire would be amazing! A few smart families had them for carting gear around, from room to pool etc. and also good for tired kids. If they'd been available we would have hired one for sure! BCF and Anaconda are down the road but we didn't really want to buy one for $100 as we have them at home. Take one if you can!
And for families, if you log in to Netflix or similar on your tv make sure to log out after you leave. I happily used another families profile the entire time, but they will be wondering why they now have kids movies suggested in netflix as they seemed to like horrors, haha.

Anyway, we had a fantastic holiday and would come back any time! We won't be going to Fiji again. Thank you so much for having us.

This is such an amazing resort. Great for families loads of activities for all ages.
They even have a room foe kids with special needs. My boys loved going and unwinding from a big day listening to relaxing music and reading a book away from the noise of the park.
The staff are very friendly and helpful,  they genuinely care.  They are very informative about all the local activities available.
We will definitely be back again.
Big thank you to Anita for all her help. She is a valuable member of the team who is very helpful and caring.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We had the most incredible family holiday at Big 4 Whitsundays! This place is a paradise for families with toddlers and young kids. The pool area was a huge hit, especially with the shallow areas where our little ones could splash around safely - not to mention the incredible waterpark!  The giant jumping cushions were so much fun for the kids to burn off energy, and we all loved spending time at the petting zoo where they could interact with the animals up close.  I think the goat there could do with a beer.

There’s never a dull moment here, with an array of activities tailored just for families—arts and crafts, outdoor movie nights, and playgrounds galore. It’s truly designed with young families in mind, and we felt so comfortable knowing our kids were entertained and safe. Can’t recommend it highly enough for a family getaway! We’ll be back for sure.
This is a fantastic place for camping. The water park is good and every facility is clean. You should only prevent sandflies and mozzies.
Great park great fun place
Perfect for the family kids are happy I'm happy. Staff have all been nice got a schedule of what's happening at the park.
We had a great time here! My son really enjoyed the water park and all that was on offer. Plenty of room to park my Kimberley Kamper within the park  so it was safe while we enjoyed a cabin.
The best caravan park for families.

Really outstanding caravan park with a huge water slides zone, pool, mini golf and nearly endless array of other kids scheduled activities in the day. When we stayed during school holidays there were different food trucks onsite in evenings to keep things interested. We were lucky enough to get a Cabin which was really well appointed kitchen, laundry, new with lots of
Ceiling fans and air conditioning. Staff were very welcoming and able to help organise tours with dedicated staff onsite to support that. Highly recommended if you have kids/younger teenagers to make most of onsite facilities.

A great park with plenty to do inside. It has a big waterslides area, a giant pool, mini golf, a playground, a jumping pillow, an outside large chess board, a basketball court, a tennis court, a volleyball court, a kids club area and much more.

The kids did not get bored the whole week we were there. Whilst I would have preferred if it was situated closer to the Airlie beach lagoon and strip, it was the best option for our stay whilst we spent the week exploring everything Airlie Beach and the surrounds has to offer.

Whilst you are there I would advise visiting the great barrier reef, Whitehaven beach, a trip upto Bowen (Horseshoe bay is absolutely stunning!), the Proserpine river croc tour (we saw some massive crocs!), Northerlies hotel and a trip down to the lagoon and playground.
With children this is Australia’s best park. It’s a theme park with caravan sites. Embrace the chaos - it’s busy
Great park, lots to do for the kids. Only lacking local amenities for the caravan sites on the western side, bit of a walk if your in a hurry
Great caravan facilities, awesome pool and slides for the kids, just midges are a bit how you are going but that's most of airile this time of year.
Great for the kids! Heaps to do around the park and location is great, close to a wide range of shops and services, the Tavern and 5 mins to Airlie Esplanade

Everything in one spot, shops a 5 minute walk and the bus at your doorstep. We even had groceries delivered so we didn't have to worry about shopping.

Kids loved every aspect of the park, including the waterpark, pool, playground, extra facilities, and the kids' activities! Hubby and I loved the different food vans available every night, so we didn't have to cook if we didn't want to.

Staff were amazing, helpful in booking transfers and tours and answr8ng every question we had.

Only one regret - we didn't stay longer!!

What an outstanding park! From the welcoming staff to the amazing water park and great onsite activities (loved the food trucks) I can’t fault this place. Powered sites are large and surrounded by an abundance of wildlife. Big shout out to Anita who organised a day trip to Whitehaven for us on the yacht “camira” , exceptional trip and customer service! 10/10

Location easy in out if coming towards Airlie you can take the side road after kfc or turn left after the concrete barriers.
Easy access for my Big Rig 19m semi trailer size.
I don't think reception understands the length of vans we could of fitted on 6 sites around us easy. And saw smaller vans put on small sites with vechile parked on road.
Lights not fully working then night guy came thru turning power off and on via breakers we were not happy.
Bushes covering power and water outlets fully.. Palm and sharp pointy leaf plants over growing pathways very seriously.
Plenty of entertainment pool jump pillows playground entertainment rooms etc.
Lots of staff seem to be driving around not doing much.
Toilets can be Far away if big rig sites but are OK but not enough between 7-9am.
Midgies ARE VERY BAD FRIENDS BOUGHT THE CREAM SOLD THERE AND NEXT DAY OR 2 BITES EVERYWHERE LIKE CHICKEN POX LOOK.
I used Vaseline intensive care with aloe Vera and not a bite on all of us.
Aeroguard doesn't sort these airlie Beach bugs out either with a creek running thru the back area.
Otherwise good place to stay with kids.

We’ve stayed at the park 2 times now, and plan on continuing to make the trip every year.

All the on-site amenities make it worth the higher price tag. The waterpark is a great size for all ages, there’s mini golf, animal farm, jumping pillow and a playground. We barely leave the park for the entirety of our stay as there is so much fun to be had onsite.

We stayed in a studio cabin on both visits, they were incredibly clean and have all the essentials.

Great park with lots of great facilities. Food trucks, mini putt putt, wonderful pool, good large site which accommodated our friends tent. Only downside was mozzies and midges. But hey this is tropical Qld on the coast.

What an amazing family park! Something for everyone and the pool and 13 water slides were perfect! The rooms were spacious, fresh, very clean and generously had a packet of cold tim Tam's waiting for us! The coffee van there every day was so handy and delicious with phone
orders also for convenience! Lots of activities and food vans visiting and the staff were so knowledgeable and eager to help with bookings, tours and local knowledge!

Great park with excellent amenities. Waterslides and pool were the favourites. Customer service team were friendly and helpful. Cabin was basically brand new. The public bus stop is out the front and it's 50c per person each way in to Airlie Beach itself (about 6-7kms).

Nice park but way to expensive to stay there.
You need deep pockets to enjoy your stay and especially if you are going away with a large family.
Came in late afternoon and not doing enough research, we were going to stay a week but decided to stay only 1 night because of the price.
There were other free spaces and they gave us a difficult site inbetween 2 trees right next to the sites that were easier to get in that were vacant.
Also the sand flies and mossies were the worst I have experienced in my travels.
Solo fuimos a jugar a minigolf, lo pasamos muy bien, sitio para familias con niños pequeños.
4 time visitor. Highly recommend
Fabulous park and extremely well kept. Lovely, friendly staff.
Absolute  cracker of a spot for kids of all ages! So much to do! Definitely coming back.
The perfect spot for a bit more high quality at a fair price, excellent service. Helped us after the reception closed

Super camping. Parties communes très propres, les « camping site » ne sont pas les uns sur les autres comme dans d’autres camping et surtout il y a des jeux incroyables pour les enfants ( piscine, toboggan, mini golf, trampoline, cinéma en pleine air…)
Noter juste que le camping est excentré du centre ville de Airlie Beach. Environ 10 min en voiture

We stayed in a cabin, which was the size of a mini house.  It was amazing. Very clean and well equipped. The cleaning staff also left us treats, which was lovely. The staff were also very friendly and helpful. The park is wonderful and very kid friendly. Very happy
Attention au fourmi rouge qui pique dans le lit. Mais le reste est top

The park is absolutely stunning, with beautifully maintained grounds, BBQ area and the mini golf, tennis court & water slides and pool area provided endless fun

The staff at the park were incredibly friendly and accommodating

We especially enjoyed the location and went on sailing tour to Whitehaven Beach - which was an unforgettable experience and created memories that will last a lifetime.

We are already looking forward to our next visit!

Such an amazing place for kids. So much to do. Staff were amazing. We loved the food vans that came in, made our choice for dinner easy. Only 2 things I can pick - no cafe or bar, I like a morning coffee! And the shower head in the showers weren’t fantastic, made washing your hair a bit difficult. But overall we had such an amazing week!
The cabin and park facilities were fantastic, perfect for families
Two nights isn't long enough 😪

아이들이 좋아하는 홀리데이 파크.
수영장과 놀이터가 잘 되어 있다.
날씨가 추워 물놀이를 많이 하지 못한게 아쉬웠다.

A great park with great facilities. Large sites. Wonderful helpful staff.
A very special mention for Anita on the front desk who has a great personality for front of house work and was just great to deal with. Our little grandson Cash just adored her.
Cheers
Colin,Deb,Emma and Cash

Amazing place to stay, lots to do for the kids, close to Airlie Beach and all the Whitsundays tours. Staff are excellent and have a great knowledge of all the various tours available. My family and I will definitely be coming back!

Absolutely amazing big4. Great for families with loads of activities.

Staff are super friendly and the accommodation is amazing. We got upgraded for some reason and were put in a brand new cabin.

Enjoyed a 3 night stay in a villa, suitable for our family of 4. Approx $310 per night. Queen size bed in bedroom and bunk beds in hallway opposite bathroom. Adequate kitchen with full sized fridge/freezer. Air-conditioned which we needed to heat the cabin on cooler nights. Make sure you wear mosquito repellent at dusk as midgies about. Our teen kids loved the water park and swimming pool area, the tennis courts and mini golf. All free to use, just pay a few dollars for the balls.  So much to do within the park. Very clean and well kept throughout. Coffee van onsite each morning we were there, was ok but quite slow and our tour guide van had to wait for us. 😬 We also tried the Thai van for dinner, very nice. We had Beagles pizza for dinner another night, very good and they delivered to the park for free which was great. Live music was on Saturday night by a talented performer. This park really has it all for families. Caravan sites spacious and shady. Highly recommended and note a discount of 10% applies for return visits.

We booked an en suite site for our motorhome and we all agreed it was a "game changer"! Just a little extra cost to have a toilet and shower right beside the van. The pool, mini golf, massage hut and kids facilities were top notch too. A few miles outside Airlie Beach itself, but not a problem if you have a vehicle.
Brilliant holiday with the family. Excellent facilities, very well maintained grounds, warm staff and a well presented unit. We will be back
Killer place for young families. Loads to do. Pool is epic and people are wonderful. Keep the grounds really well maintained too.

Excellent caravan park with exceptional facilities to entertain families. Caravan sites are well laid out with plenty of privacy. You are a short drive from the activity of Airlie, but you really have no reason to leave unless you are looking for a meal over and above your own cooking abilities.
Good size caravan sites, lots of stuff to do for the kids. We had an awesome time, will definitely be back
Large drive through caravan bays, well organised and run. Was school holidays so plenty of families enjoying the pool, but still nice and peaceful.
Just had one night here and it was lovely. Perfect for families worth their amazing pool and slides. Charity Roast dinner night was also nice.

Our first stay at this amazing resort and we will definitely be back!
From the moment we arrived we felt welcome. We were able to use the park facilities as we were too early for check in which was so helpful.
Our cabin was clean and spacious and there were all the required amenities with the added extra of Tim Tam's in the fridge!
On our second day we received a phone call to 'check in' and see how we were going, I'd we were happy. This goes above and beyond and really made us feel like our hosts cared.
We were also offered a 'room top up and towel change' on our third day. Something we'd never had in similar resorts and were so grateful.
The park facilities are clean and well maintained. The activities provided are amazing; food trucks, kids discos, movie nights. The pool and waterslides are all in the one area meaning mum and dad can pick a sun lounge and relax!
All of the staff we encountered; reception, grounds keeping, cleaning, animal farm and Froggy; were kind, happy, friendly and just warm to be around.
An absolute added bonus for families like ours was the Sensory Room. It was so helpful to have a space where our 6yo could go to 'reset' whilst feeling overwhelmed by all the activities and people. It even made him feel welcomed and that he 'fit in'. He noticed other families using the room and commented that he was not the only one with ASD. It was so nice to know he felt like he belonged.
This was just the perfect holiday for our family. It ticked every box! We will be back!
Thank you!

My goodness, worth every star! We've just had the most spectacular holiday with friends and our kids at Big4 Adventure Whitsunday Resort. Our expectations were high given all the rave reviews and we weren't disappointed! Poolside condos were well equipped, comfortable, clean and a great large deck. (Sharper knives and a chopping board would've been welcome though!) The activities including the animal farm, wildlife encounter and the pool and water slides were just brilliant. Everything you need for a family holiday, what an absolute gem of a spot - highly recommend.

VERY difficult sites to get into. Bring alot of chocks to level on the very uneven ground. There are better van parks in Airlie Beach. If you can't fit and they are busy, they will offer you an unofficial spot in a communal bbq area. Just terrible, truly.

The park has great activities and facilities for the kids (and adults), kept tidy and clean and the landscaping is lovely. The sensory room is wonderful and the staff are helpful when booking tours and very friendly. Only complaint is there are not enough toilets/showers for the size of the park. I was disappointed that the price we paid was excessive ($989.80 for 8 nights powered site) for the site/location we were given which had no amenities nearby, and was opposite the maintenance yard so noisy works each morning.
Lots for the children to do, well kept.

Our second visit to the park and enjoyed our stay.

Honestly, it's expensive for what it is, but you have the pleasure of a resort style everything for the big $.

Older amenities, however very nice and clean.

Most of the sites are set amongst lovely gardens separating each site, quite nice.

Absolutely fantastic for kids, park, 2 x jumping pillows, small animal park, pool and a heap of water slides.

Only draw back for us, we were SMASHED by midges, even after coating ourselves in deterrent, would have to be the worst we have experienced, particularly sitting by the pool.

The team that checked us in on arrival were absolutely fantastic, super nice and helpful, thanks for making us feel so welcome!

We have been wanting to come here for a while and finally made it. Fantastic place to holiday with the kids and don’t need a car at all.. Courtesy buses, public transport and daily hire cars dropped off at the front door if neeeded. We cannot fault this place and looking forward to coming back next year! Big shout out to Sandy for all the information and hospitality !
