Had such an amazing time here we booked 2 extra nights. We have a 9 yr old and after dragging her to all the places we wanted to go this was a fantastic happy medium. Loved day's by the pool, Thai and pizza nights watching a movie on the big screen, our lot was spacious for our 22' motorhome and $88.20 for this waterpark was a steal in our eyes, we wouldn't get into a waterpark let alone stay for that. Another thing the facilities were SO clean, laundry was so great, tons of space to hang clothes if wanted. The showers are awesome in comparison to the other campsites we so far have stayed in out 21 day travels from Sydney to Cairns. Would definitely recommend.

Good caravan sites but narrow and longish. We back onto a nice open space next to a kitchenette. Pool was slightly heated, enough to go in, not enough to stay in but that's being fussy. WaterPark was a huge hit with my 1 and 4yo. Activities available (free paint and sipx champers provided) lovely service from all staff. Would recommend
Great place to stay in Airlie Beach. Great value. Good activities. Friendly service.

It's a fantastic place to go as a family holiday.  13 slides YES 13.
33 Mt Pool, Petting zoo. It's amazing.
We love staying here. Perfect for a small family break! Our son loves the water park and the animals! We have gotten a 2 bedroom cabin for personal preference but all the cabins look roomy!
Have a great time stayed with wife and kids for the week would definitely do again

Ein toller Erlebnispark, sogar mit einem kleinen Streichelzoo, unsere Tochter hat es geliebt. Wir waren für vier Nächte mit unserem Wohnmobil hier. Es gibt in diesem Park wirklich so viel zu entdecken und zu bespielen. Wir kommen gern wieder

You’d be crazy to come to Airlie beach with kids and not stay here. Airlie beach itself is beautiful but unless you’re going to the islands, there’s not heaps to do there. However if you stay at this park you don’t really need to go anywhere. It’s a kids paradise, one of the most relaxing holiday’s I’ve ever had!
Excellent modern facilities. Water park was awesome. There with a school group.

We recently had the pleasure of staying at Big 4 Adventure Whitsundays, and it was an absolute delight, especially for our children! The highlight of our visit was undoubtedly the waterpark, which provided endless fun and activities for the kids. From thrilling waterslides to the expansive splash pad, every corner of the waterpark was designed with family fun in mind. The park was impeccably maintained, with safety as a clear priority, ensuring a stress-free experience for parents.

The pools were perfect for all ages, featuring gentle areas for the little ones and more adventurous sections for the older kids, making it an ideal spot for families looking to cater to different age groups. The staff at the waterpark were incredibly friendly and attentive, always on hand to help with a smile.

Beyond the waterpark, the resort offered a variety of activities that kept our family entertained throughout our stay. The kid-friendly events and family entertainment evenings were particularly enjoyable. The accommodation options were versatile, clean, and comfortable, ideal for families of any size.

Big 4 Adventure Whitsundays is a must-visit for families seeking a blend of excitement and relaxation. It's more than just a place to stay; it's an experience that your family will cherish. We’re already planning our next trip back!

Kids' and parents' paradise. The team is super friendly, park well laid out, pool and slides are amazing and it's super central! We really enjoyed the weekly activities: kids' club, flower crown, sand art, chocolate ball making and animal farm. Kids had a blast and the 7 nights + 7 FOC was a great offer!

Visited 2024-04. Clear sky during our stay.

- Staffs were polite.
- Natural site PG05, 04….. located next to major road, very noise in the early morning. Unable to sleep. Please consider not to put customers there unless it’s full.
- Facility were well maintained.
- Toilet and sinks were too high for 2-7 years old. Kids were unable to wash hands by themselves. Hope management can install more kids friendly sinks and toilets.
Elsker det sted og vender helt sikkert tilbage.

Very big resort with cabins and motorhomes.  We stayed in a motorhome.  We had a space near  which was OK but no privacy.  Staff were nice and helpful.  Good amenities for young children.  Our son enjoyed the mini golf and water slides.  The shower facilities need improvement.

Es un camping familiar con un área acuática con toboganes y piscinas,
Mini golf, cochecotos … tiene árboles con sobra que dan un ambiente selvático.

Amazing would be hard to find a better park in all of Australia . We had the most amazing house !  . The kids talk about constantly wanting to go back , the slides , pools , golf and kids activities are amazing .

Das ist DER Familypark Australiens! Wir waren begeistert. Es gibt auch einen Bus vor den Toren des Parks mit schnellen Verbindungen in die Stadt Airlie Beach oder zum Hafen, wo die Cruises z. B. nach Hamilton Island oder Whitsunday Islands ablegen. Es gibt auch einen Essenswagen mit leckerem Frühstück, allerdings nur bis 11 Uhr geöffnet.
Great stay and location-stay was a month ago

This Big4 caravan park is huge!

Pros:
1. Amenities are clean and new-ish
2. There are trees planted in between the caravan sites, so it creates more privacy for people staying next to each other.
3. The pool and playground area is massive. With lots of slides and kid friendly activity zones.
4. They even have a little food van operating. For those who want ice cream or a bite to eat.

Cons:
1. the place is super busy and noisy.
If you want some relaxing time, you might be disappointed.
2. The kitchen equipment mostly caters to grilling. They only have 1 gas stove, available. Not nearly enough for hundreds of people staying here.
3. No access to the sea or creek. You will need to drive a bit to get to good swimming place or a beach.

Management is atrocious. My complaint was seen with a patronising phone call and the manager followed suit. Our alarm in the cabin went off at 5am for no reason which gave everyone a heart attack and kept on going.
The ants were all throu the bed and on the pillows. Very unclean.
There was no monitoring of alcohol in the pool so we had to contend with drunk males in the pool with the children and even dropping their drinks in the pool. Some type of supervision should have been there like other resorts.
The location isn’t close to anything without a car. The amenities were outdated and the activities were not appealing to the children and they need to consider all age groups for both activities and movie nights.
I am so disappointed in this holiday we travelled along way and we were met with no understanding just my complaint was turned onto me by management and I’m assuming their reply would be the same.
I suggest if you come to Airlie to go to an island. This isn’t worth the money or disappointment.

Have stayed here a few times with my family and everytime we stay here it has always been a dream. Swimming and movie night were big hits for my children, they also loved riding around in the go karts.
We went on a couple of tours and staying at Big4 really helped because they can pick you up and drop you right back off at Big4.
A Huge Big Thank You to Big 4 Staff for making my family and i’s Family Vacation a Dream!!

What a fantastic place! They have thought of everything. Last stop on a 3 week trip and it
Excelled. Even the finer details of the toilet doors closing quietly and the road lights being switched off at night. Little cafe with coffee, ice-cream van, pizza night, movie nights (although it was disco night and wasn’t that good, only some kids into it and a bit more catering to older kids) The slides are the best, suits small kids and big kids (me) perfectly. Animal farm was fabulous, the girls were fantastic and the animals of course too. Good vibes place that I wish we could’ve stayed longer in!

We really enjoyed our stay at the BIG4 Adventure Whitsunday Resort. Kids loved the all the slides and playing putt putt. We loved it so much we have rebooked for next year.
Only suggestion would be to have the food trailer/cafe open later than 2pm. Other than that it was perfect. Great pools, clean and well maintained toilet/shower blocks and laundry.

The water slides are unbelievably awesome, I will be surprised if there is another one of its kind in Airlie Beach!
I am putting this review out while  we have 2 days to check-out, I will definitely visit again and recommend to friends!

It is a brilliant place to bring the kids, with endless fun and entertainment. Our powered site was perfect! Privately divided from other sites with a tropical garden and a drive-through option with a large green space, which serves as a large corridor amongst campers to utilise as a safe playing space for kids.
The amenities block was large, clean and modern. Now the fun stuff.. the water park is GREAT! So many hours spent here having fun on all the slides, chilling in the pool and spa area. Plenty of sun chairs and shaded areas to escape the sun. A cute little Cafe located beside the pool area. Putt-putt Golf has a massive 18 hole course. Other activities included: feeding the farm animals, reptile show (great photo opportunity) go-cart riding,  the playground, tennis and even a visit from the Whitsunday Mermaid. Lots of tours to choose from which can be booked conveniently at reception.
Booking in early for next summer!

Cabins are well equipped, clean and functional. The kids were in "play heaven". The waterpark, mini golf, go-cart,outside cinema, wood fire pizza caravan, what more could you want for a perfect holiday. Highly recommended. We just did our second stay there and this place still rocks....

Beautiful place to go camping, close access to shops and shoet drive into town and beaches.

The water Park is amazing! Super fun, best time to go is when its less packed at noon.

They have a sensory room for those with asd (autism) which was great and I had never seen one before! Made me so happy to see that this big 4 really looks out for everyone

Really nice and friendly staff members and keeps updated via texts. 10/10

Only reason this isn't a 5 star review is because of all the mosquito's and flies, but that's because it's very hot and near a creek.

Where else can we go after this camping trip? Water slides, pools, great amenities, playground, tv in the kitchen, go karts.. even you get to eat fresh herbs.

The camping experience is now absolutely changed.. what can we do after this trip 😀😀

Stayed at this resort for 8 nights. The cabin we had was brilliant for my little family and was perfectly suited next to the play ground. Can watch the kids from the front porch. Highly recommended if you are heading up north with the family,we will be coming back. Next time it will be in the Caravan. Well done to all staff maintaining this Big4 and the professional service when needed.
Friendly and professional staff, clean and well maintained facilities and amenities

Stayed on a powered site. Great facilities and had a fabulous time, from the pool, waterslides, karts, mini golf, holiday activities right down to pizza, thai, mr wippy and much, much more will definitely return/recommend. HOWEVER, I found the quality of a few small amount of people (School holidays time) ruined the full experience at times, which is always bound to happen, in big places like this.
The most discusting experience was when I had a shower. I noticed a used tampon left on the shower window sill and still being there for 3 days after, in this heat and humidity you can imagine. Then what looked like Blood on the sink bench, with a blood-soaked sponge, where I assume someone attempted to clean up their body fluids, but found it to be too hard, so left it there for others too see and smell and for the poor cleaner to deal with.
The shower drain backed up while in the shower not only flooding the shower but the whole cubical at the same time as it came out both drain holes, and flooding the whole shower cubicle, nothing like dirty pipe water around your feet.
As for the pool, a lot of adults were drinking in the pool/area contrary to signage, adults back flipping and bombing all the while the pool was packed which then encourage the young teen boys/girls to bomb and flip into the pool which was disruptive at times, unfortunately nobody did anything about even when an attendant was looking.
I understand peak season, "is peak season" and its handwork to run and maintain a huge facility Like this with full house bookings, however, instead of one pool attendant maybe 3 or 4 could help with keeping people to conform with rules and policies you have had us all sign on condition of entry, prior to staying.
A huge positive is that night times are quiet with no noise after 10 pm, even on Christmas night it was pleasant.
Laundry, great facilities. However, one machine smelt like mold, so didn't use it, also there is signs up to remove clothes once cycle has finished, 1 hours was waited, as two of the four washers had washing sitting in it before, and well after I finished my washing. Maybe some signs on the lids of the washers could work, a suggestion?
Waste facilities are everywhere, so there is no reason to have rubbish sitting around for bush turkeys to get into, keeps the atmosphere clean, and a place to want to be, JR RICHARDS comes every other day. The bins are emptied often, and your nose is never assaulted with the smell of rotten food.
In general, most of the people around are considerate and respectful to others around the campsites.
Facilities: The facilities are overall very clean and well maintained. Structurally, nothing is broken or rundown. The gardens are beautiful, the children park is great, and the grounds are mown neatly.
Beside the few negative, it's a great place to bring your family in peak holiday season.
Thank you for the nice place to stay.
We have visited this caravan park many times over the past 10 years. It is always clean, staff friendly and a wide range if activities for the whole family.
Awesome place to bring the family. We are camping in tents and it is fantastic. The facilities are clean and plenty of activities for the kids. The pool and water slides a real hit with everyone.

Such a nice place to stay. We stayed in a caravan there so unsure what cabins are like but our spot is close to amenities and the pool area.

We spent 6 days here and there is always something on for the kids.

The parents shower room for dads is such a good idea. It's hard travelling when a solo dad with children.

It's a nice place and would definitely come again one day.

What could be done better? My kids wondered where the frog is?? Never made an appearance.

The Putt Putt course is neglected. Has broken bits so doesn't work properly, and there is no water flow in the ponds so has become a breeding ground for mosquitoes, dumped rubbish and grubby looking water.

It's not cheap to stay here so things should be up to scratch :)
Very much worth it. Even when it rained the kids did not want to leave the pool area.
Everything you need is here.

Excellent accommodation for a family. Comfortable beds. Cabins/condos are thoughtfully decked out with everything you might need. Staff are friendly and receptive to issues. Wide variety of activities for families to do.
Never stayed in the rooms but for the kids this place is so so good it's all they want to do.
Great spot for a holiday, big pools for kids...
Great place. Kid-friendly and would recommend it to others.  My daughter had a blast and enjoyed the water park.

Had two great experiences here. Such a fun place to stay with kids and the cabins are really cosy and very functional. The water slides (bucket deserves a special mention) the petting zoo and tennis and mini golf are great. Its very relaxing for parents. The staff are wonderful too, we had some difficulty with cancelling and rebooking and they were really helpful about everything. Its worth going out of your way to visit, thank you!
Pouze jedna noc v karavanu, čisté sprchy i toalety .Kuchyně vybavena grilem troubou lednicí atd. Trošku dražší než jinde  ale co se dá dělat...

13 waterslides, for all ages...including grown ups haha
Plus a real life MERMAID 🧜‍♀️ ✨️ and Mini golf.
Great day out!!!
Recommend taking your own food and shade 😎
Grote camping met heel veel (kinder)activiteiten. Mijn zoon vond vooral de zand kunst en het zwembad het leukst. Camping is schoon en goed onderhouden. Niet goedkoop maar wel veel te doen.

One of the best holiday park that i have ever visited. Sooo much to do for the kids and adults. Mini golf, 10 waterslides, animal park, basketball and tennis court with a great playground. Such a beautiful and clean place and only minutes from the main part of airlie beach. WILL DEFINATLY BE COMING BACK IN THE FUTURE.
Cabin was large, spacious and very modern. Resort facilities were great, especially the water slides and pool. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Had a great time and would definitely go back.
Great family accommodation with plenty for the kids to do.
We had a powered site with 2 kids and 2 infants and we all had a wonderful time. Park was very clean, staff were very polite and helpful. We all had a ball.

We are locals of The Whitsundays and stay at Big4 every year for Halloween. It is the best annual family event. The kids absolutely love the pool, slides, and freedom of being able to ride their scooters around to play with friends. Highly recommend!

Just stayed 6 nights with our 2 kids, the stay 2 nights get one free deal is great value for money while out on the road travelling and the park is a kids dream! Water slides to keep them entertained for hours and lots of other activities within the park for the kids to do daily, an outdoor movie every night, on site food vans and an animal farm. The onsite Vintage cafe caravan has the most delicious fruit soft serves and juices! The staff are all happy friendly and helpful and the location is just a short drive into Airlie Beach. There is also a shopping centre right next to the caravan park. We will definitely be back! It does get quite a lot busier on the weekends but that’s the same case everywhere. Airlie Beach is a great family holiday with loads to do for the whole family!
This was the best caravan park we have stayed at. The kid were never bored and the accommodation was amazing. Best trip we ever booked!
Just a beautiful fun place to stay so much to do and the staff were all amazing 😍

Park was great. Was an easy enough ride into Airlie beach lagoon for the family.
Kids loved the pool,slides,tennis,movies, putt putt golf, and animal shows

Called up to ask if I could store my camper trailer for 2 nights. Was advised on the phone that yes I could, $10/night. I clarified that I didn't have a booking there, person on phone said no problem.

Turned up the next day to check the camper in, the lady at the front desk told me I need at least a 1 night booking for "insurance purposes". Minimum rate $70 for 1 night.

I'd have been perfectly ok with this mix up but the way I was spoken at the front desk wasn't welcoming or an apologetic manner for the situation. I was basically told "unless you want to book 1 night, get lost".

Down the road Whitsundaycaravancampingtrailer allow for storage $35/week. Great business. Big4, not straight on their policies, and focused on flushing money from your wallet.

We had an amazing holiday at the Big4 WhitSundays Holiday Park, so many fun activities to do, the Cabins were so nice & it was nice and close to everything.
The only issue we had is that the WIFI kept dropping in and out but other than that our stay was amazing, would definitely stay here again.
Amazing stay! Thank you
The resort was incredible, water park slides and pool were a fantastic escape from the humidity, and staff were knowledgeable and friendly.
Great base camp for exploring the Whitsundays, or just staying in camp at relaxing and letting the kids ride around the park or spend the day at the pool with the kids on the watersides

Lots of free stuff! Movie nights, pizza and even breakfast pancakes that cost a gold coin donation, the money goes to a child with a disease. Wonderful and full of fun!
Only thing wrong is that you can't have a late checkout:
Apart from that, amazing
place, definitely recommended it!
Note: it's really expensive, but worth every cent!
This place is amazing, perfect for a family holiday. The kids had a blast in the waterpark.

We booked in on the 6/9/23

chainsaws operating till aftermidnight on the property line 5m from our camp with 4 trucks removing powerlines and powerpoles. The park messaged in the morning saying it was out of their hands and not to their knowledge....

Had a wonderful weekend there with the grandkids.
Great location, amazing pool area, and friendly staff but the camping spots are small (Anything bigger than a 13ft camper will take some effort to park.)
The water was kind of wet and imp scared
Great pool activity areas. The girls on the front counter are super helpful. Got our tours sorted. Answered all our questions. Will definitely stay again.
Great place for kids.dont need to leave park but if you do theres shops walking distance. Main stripv5 mins away.

We stayed at a powered grass site. The site was clean and shady and perfect for our family. Overall the resort was great, clean and well maintained. The kids loved the swimming areas and water park. We will definitely come back.

Dit park is goed onderhouden en schoon. Kids vinden het waterpark geweldig. Zelf vind ik de douchgordijnen in de douches echt niet meer kunnen. Sanitair is wat verouderd. Camperplaatsen zijn aan de smalle kant. ||Camping oraniseerd veel leuke activiteiten.

Great park for families. Awesome splashpark and pool facilities. There is mini golf, outdoor movies, and playground. They have a great timetable pf activities. Located out of the centre of Airlie Beach, however there is a bus stop right out the front with buses running frequently. Woolworths a short 10 minute walk.
Great place with really good activities for kids.

The team at Big4 were amazing. Our son got quite sick the first day we were there and so our stay was cut short as we ended up at Townsville hospital for a while. The staff could not have been more caring and helpful to us during this time. They really went above and beyond when we were going through a tough time.
Can't wait to come back one day and actually enjoy all the great facilities and activities on offer! Thanks again for everything.
To visit friends was asked for 20 dollars per person ,we are in our 70 years we were not going to use the facilities would never stay in park.

Great place to stay with family.
Our kids had an amazing time in the pool/splash park
Great place for families to stay. Happy with our accommodation and activities available.

This place is fantastic, I could stay here for a life time!

Amazing playgrounds and water parks for the family.

Amenities block we had was a coin only laundry.

Water pressure and toilet blocks were superb 👌
Older camping area was great with heaps of shade.  Facilities were good and the kids love the skids, mini golf and buggies.
Great park for kids.
Great facilities, helpful staff. Activities for children during school holidays, make it easy for families just to chill in the park.

This is it, the only big4 you need to go to. We stayed in a 2 bedroom holiday cottage, it had everything we needed.
Customer service is top 👌,  activities for kids , facilities they have thought of everything.
Perfect holiday
Great resort, amazing facilities and exceptional staff.
Kids rate at 10/10, who I am I to argue with that.
We had a wonderful & valuable family time at this resort! Highly recommended to all!
It’s amazing park. We had Fun with kids.

Great resort for the family. Plenty to do, from dining to mini golf. Food trick arrived, a perfect accompaniment to the evening family movie. Electric scooters and bicycles aren't allowed through the property, but plenty of kids on old-school scooters kicking around. Property should be easier to get in and out of once the road works is done. A little ways from the beach, but still a nice place to chill with the family. Barbecue on the veranda, and great dog contained cabin. Helpful staff when we had trouble with the WiFi. Be sure to bring bug repellent!

Walking distance to shopping centre, takeaways and short drive to caravan repair centre and Bunnings (opposite directions). Pub close by, fresh fisho round the corner. Resort has plenty of amenities, $5 (5×$1 coins) for washing, plenty of line space. Farm animals over the back, pool, water slides, coffee van, "movie night" on the big screen. Drive through sites out the front - not sure they'd fit 8m+ rigs but possibly. Office staff very efficient, van storage out the back (grassed area). Popular in school holiday periods. Roadworks out the front for three years - looking forward to an OUTSTANDING piece of road engineering when council finishes. 😀

Lovely 2 week stay. We don't have children but highly recommend for families or couples. The resort is highly maintained the staff are friendly and helpful. The only issue we had was grey  water was constantly trickling down the road which would of been put too better use on the plants. And did smell at times.
Camping tranquilo y con todas las comodidades y disfrute de los más pequeños

Great spot, and great if you have kid as there is lots for them to do. Good size caravan sites and space from neighbours.  The only issue I had was they need another block of ablutions and laundry for the amount of people they fit in their large park and further down near the Animal feeding area as it was quite a walk.
The best big 4 park we have stayed at

Good service very nice park with alot for children to do
Water park is a must
Make sure to take advantage of the utilities and there perks out of the park

Absolutely incredible place to stay for our family holiday to Airlie Beach with our children who are 9, 7 & 4. We booked a 3 bedroom condo which was clean, spacious, & well equipped. We used the BBQ on the deck everyday. The staff were so friendly and nothing was a hassle. Our kids loved the water park & pool, and keep asking when we can go back. Thank you for a wonderful holiday experience!
Just the best in everything staff so kind

Great spot to stay, the kids loved it! All the staff were nice too.
The park is well kept and loved that there was plenty of trees around the park and between sites.
The animal farm was a bit with the kids too

Only thing that was a bit odd was there was no grey water drain, we had to direct it into the garden

We chose to stay here because of the kid friendly attractions. Our son is 6 and loved the water park mini golf and kids outdoor cinema. The powered sites were great and amenities clean and tidy. Definately more suited for young families. Was a lil pricey but was worth it for what they had to offer.
